He's told that if he wins, any wish he makes will be granted... All the participants are powerful contenders who fight their hardest for their own wishes. What awaits them at the end of the tournament? A chaotic battle between unbelievably strong high school students is about to begin!

creator: Marcela Citerrio
descEn: Victoria Balvanera owns a vast expanse of land and a prestigious advertising agency. She is married to the landowner Nelson Brizz. Following an attempted kidnapping, she finds love with José Ángel—her rescuer and the estate's new foreman.

desc:
是日本漫畫家平本Akira所創作的校園搞笑漫畫，於2011年開始在講談社青年漫畫雜誌《週刊Young Magazine》連載。香港中文版由東立出版社出版，台灣中文版由台灣東販出版。

2013年，獲得第37回講談社漫畫賞（一般部門）。2014年8月發售的第14卷單行本發表了動畫化消息。於作者Twitter及第276話宣布，第277話為最終回。

男囚篇

2011年4月，東京知名女子學校私立八光學園從女校改為男女合校，首批入校的是五名男學生清志、葛人、真吾、讓、安德魯，他們將與全校1016名女學生共學。

入學後不久，五名男學生策劃偷窺女子澡堂，但立刻遭到裏學生會逮捕，送入校內監獄後施以各種刑
descEn: There was a time when the Hachimitsu Private Academy was a revered and elite all-girls' boarding school on the outskirts of Tokyo but a recent policy revision is allowing boys into the student body. On his first day, Kiyoshi Fujino discovers that he's one of only five boys enrolled at the school. Completely overwhelmed by the thousands of girls on campus, the few boys find that their situation is less than ideal.

creator: Jymn Magon
desc: 唐老鴨加入海軍後，休依、杜依和路依就交給了史高治麥德照顧。
descEn: Scrooge McDuck finds his hands full at home when nephews Huey, Dewey and Louie move to Duckburg. Joined by their loyal pals Launchpad McQuack, Gyro Gearloose and Mrs. Beakley, the DuckTales gang never fails to deliver a wealth of adventure. Get ready for a fortune of fun with DuckTales!

titleCn: 彩虹小馬 ：友情就是魔法
titleNative: My Little Pony: Friendship Is Magic
creator: Lauren Faust
desc: 在前往夢幻之地小馬國的旅程中，獨角獸紫悅和她的夥伴們在探險中學習到友情的珍貴。
titleEn: My Little Pony: Friendship Is Magic
descEn: Journey to the enchanted land of Equestria, where unicorn Twilight Sparkle and her pals have adventures and learn valuable lessons about friendship.

creator: Mauricio Cruz
descEn: Doña Bárbara is a Spanish-language telenovela produced by the United States-based television network Telemundo, Sony Pictures Television International and RTI Colombia. Edith González and Christian Meier star in this adaptation of the 1929 novel by Venezuelan author Rómulo Gallegos.

creator: Sol Saks
desc: 60 年代賣座魔幻喜劇電視影集，伊麗莎白孟哥馬利飾演的莎曼珊是位具有超能力的魔法仙女，為了愛情她化身為平凡人與她所心愛的丈夫組成了家庭。但天真善良的莎曼珊，卻私底下動動鼻子並運用魔力幫助家人及朋友解決問題，一連串的麻煩與趣事，就此發生...
descEn: Samantha Stephens is a seemingly normal suburban housewife who also happens to be a genuine witch, with all the requisite magical powers. Her husband Darrin insists that Samantha keep her witchcraft under wraps, but situations invariably require her to indulge her powers while keeping her bothersome mother Endora at bay.

creator: 永井豪
desc: 惡魔再度甦醒，人類陷入動盪之中，一名心細敏感的男孩被神秘友人了捲入一場殘酷而墮落的正邪之戰。
descEn: Akira Fudo learns from his best friend Ryo Asuka that demons will revive and reclaim the world from humans. With humans hopeless against this threat, Ryo suggests combining with a demon. With this, Akira becomes Devilman, a being with the power of demon but with a human heart.

creator: 金周煥
desc: 兩個年輕拳擊手和一位仁慈的放債人合作，共同對付把經濟弱勢者當成目標的惡毒高利貸。
descEn: Faced with ruthless foes with a violent thirst, two young boxers band together — risking life and limb to bring justice and protect their loved ones.

desc:
2018年「隊長小翼」將再度讓世界沸騰！本作品描述轉學進入南葛小學的天才足球少年「大空翼」，在與「若林源三」、「日向小次郎」等來自全國的對手們的戰鬥中，逐漸成長蛻變為獨當一面的足球運動員。

「隊長小翼」爽朗的故事與個性豐富的人物，以及充滿震撼任誰都想加以模仿的各種美技，瞬時一躍成為人氣漫畫。其人氣飄洋過海在世界上掀起「隊長小翼」的熱潮。據說「隊長小翼」是日本國內外許多職業足球運動員誕生的契機。
descEn: The passionate story of an elementary school student whose thoughts and dreams revolve almost entirely around the love of soccer. 11-year-old Tsubasa Oozora started playing football at a very young age, and while it was mostly just a recreational sport for his friends, for him, it developed into something of an obsession.  In order to pursue his dream to the best of his elementary school abilities, Tsubasa moves with his mother to Nankatsu city, which is well-known for its excellent elementary school soccer teams. But although he was easily the best in his old town, Nankatsu has a lot more competition, and he will need all of his skill and talent in order to stand out from this new crowd.

creator: Aaron Sorkin
desc: 該劇講述的是一家虛構的有線電視新聞網ACN的故事，由好萊塢金牌編劇艾倫索金打造，通過新聞間裡的緊張工作來反應整個美國社會，在政治、經濟等各個方面都有著犀利的觀點，對美國近年來的重大社會事件都有所涉及，也深層展現了媒體人的生活和工作狀態。
descEn: A behind-the-scenes look at the people who make a nightly cable-news program. Focusing on a network anchor, his new executive producer, the newsroom staff and their boss, the series tracks their quixotic mission to do the news well in the face of corporate and commercial obstacles-not to mention their own personal entanglements.

creator: Scott Peters
desc: 一個本被認為是彗星的東西在美國華盛頓州Mount Rainier附近的Cascade Range丘陵放下了整整4400個人。所有這4400個人都是從1946年開始不同時間不同地點在一束光中消失的。在他們返回以後，沒有人年齡增長，都感到很疑惑，而且對失蹤以後發生的事毫無記憶。
descEn: 4400 centers on the return of 4400 people who, previously presumed dead or reported missing, reappear on Earth. Though they have not aged physically, some of them seem to have deeper alterations ranging from superhuman strength to an unexplained healing touch. A government agency is formed to track the 4400 people after one of them commits a murder.

creator: Eli Jorné
desc: 《陰屍路：死亡之城》以蘿倫科漢（Lauren Cohan）飾演的瑪姬和傑佛利迪恩摩根（Jeffrey Dean Morgan）演出的尼根為主角，探索在紐約市的末日故事。
descEn: Maggie and Negan travel to post-apocalyptic Manhattan - long ago cut off from the mainland. The crumbling city is filled with the dead and denizens who have made it a world full of anarchy, danger, beauty, and terror.

creator: Barry O'Brien
desc: 《孟漢娜》是美國華特迪士尼公司出品的青少年情境喜劇，於2006年3月24日在美國迪士尼頻道首播且反應熱烈，令這套影整合爲全美國甚至加拿大最受歡迎的青少年電視節目，也捧紅了當時只有13歲的麥莉·希拉。
descEn: At home and school, she's Miley Stewart, a typical teenager, but when the lights go down and the curtain goes up, she emerges as the glamorous and talented Hannah Montana. Having the "Best of Both Worlds" is a complicated proposition, and keeping her identity under wraps leads Miley and her friends into some hilarious capers as she tries to balance her normal life with her rock star persona.

creator: Benjamin Cavell
desc: 故事描述美國國防部研發最高機密生化武器「藍色專案」的實驗室裡，因為一台電腦發生了十億分之一秒的錯誤，超級病毒「奇普斯隊長」因而被釋放。美國政府束手無策，民眾陷入空前恐慌，而在死亡與鮮血交織的重重黑霧間，綽號「暗黑男」的不死巫師佛來格正不禁咧嘴微笑，因為他重生的時刻終於到了……
descEn: In a world mostly wiped out by the plague and embroiled in an elemental struggle between good and evil, the fate of mankind rests on the frail shoulders of the 108-year-old Mother Abagail and a handful of survivors. Their worst nightmares are embodied in a man with a lethal smile and unspeakable powers: Randall Flagg, the Dark Man.

creator: Michael J. Weithorn
descEn: Life’s good for deliveryman Doug Heffernan, until his newly widowed father-in-law, Arthur, moves in with him and his wife Carrie. Doug is no longer the king of his domain, and instead of having a big screen television in his recently renovated basement, he now has a crazy old man.

creator: Banu Akdeniz
descEn: Miran is seeking revenge for his parents death so he plans to marry daughter Reyyan from the family who were responsible for that. Unexpectedly he falls in love with Reyyan. Will this change the plan?

creator: 埃里克·奧弗邁耶
desc: 《絕命警探》改編自美國偵探作家麥可康納利（Michael Connelly）以洛杉磯警探哈瑞鮑許（Harry Bosch）為主角的系列小說，描述哈瑞鮑許在追查一樁 13 歲男孩謀殺案的同時必須面對自己陷入的連環殺手案審判。
descEn: Harry Bosch, an LAPD homicide detective, stands trial for the fatal shooting of a serial murder suspect. A cold case involving the remains of a missing boy forces Bosch to confront his past. As daring recruit Julia Brasher catches his eye and departmental politics heat up, Bosch will pursue justice at all costs.

Disney's The Little Mermaid is an American animated television series produced by Walt Disney Television Animation based on the 1989 Disney film of the same name. It features the adventures of Ariel as a mermaid prior to the events of the film. This series is the first Disney television series to be spun off from a major animated film. Some of the voice actors of the film reprise their roles in the series, among them Jodi Benson as Ariel, Samuel E. Wright as Sebastian, Kenneth Mars as King Triton, and Pat Carroll as Ursula.

titleNative: ヘルシング アルティメット
desc: 故事延續著愛爾蘭作家布拉姆·斯托克的著名小說《吸血鬼德古拉》，在亞伯拉罕·范·海辛教授（Abraham Van Helsing）打倒了不死的德古拉之後，時間過了約100年，英國王立國教騎士團Hellsing是專門殲滅對抗大英帝國和英國國教的反基督怪物的特殊機關，而其中的王牌是拿着常人無法使用的大口徑手槍的吸血鬼阿爾卡特，在一次任務中轉化了被狹持的女警西洛斯，之後兩人就以主僕的關係進行任務。
descEn: For over a century, the mysterious Hellsing Organization has been secretly protecting the British Empire from the undead. When Sir Integra Hellsing succeeded as the head of the organization, she also inherited the ultimate weapon against these supernatural enemies: Alucard, a rogue vampire possessing mysterious and frightening powers. Now, Hellsing must deal with a more dangerous threat than vampires.

creator: John Hlavin
desc: 一名戰功彪炳的前海軍陸戰隊狙擊手重出江湖，打擊暗殺總統的陰謀，卻在不久後，發現自己遭到陷害，捲入兇殺案件。
descEn: Bob Lee Swagger is an expert marksman living in exile who is coaxed back into action after learning of a plot to kill the president.

creator: 류용재
desc: 在南北統一的韓國，一群小偷佔領了鑄幣局。由於有人質受困，警方必須阻止他們，更要逮到策劃一切的藏鏡人。
titleEn: Money Heist: Korea - Joint Economic Area
descEn: Disguised under the shadows of a mask, a crew of desperados band together under the leadership of a criminal mastermind known only as “The Professor” to pull off the biggest heist Korea has ever seen.

titleCn: 蒙提·派森的飛行馬戲團
creator: Ian MacNaughton
desc: 蒙提·派森的演員們結合豐富的智慧、創造力和巧妙的時機，加上熱愛嘲笑和變裝，成功打響名號。
descEn: A British sketch comedy series with the shows being composed of surreality, risqué or innuendo-laden humour, sight gags and observational sketches without punchlines.

creator: Carmen Finestra
desc: 電動工具、養育子女和現代男性的神秘感是《家居裝飾》的喜劇基石，這是一部發自內心且有趣的家庭喜劇，講述了現代男性對身為男性的疑問。
descEn: The daily trials and tribulations of handyman Tim Taylor, a TV show host raising three boys with help from his loyal co-host, domineering wife, and unseen neighbor.

creator: Michael Jacobs
descEn: The adventures of relatable and adventurous Riley Matthews, the tween daughter of Cory and Topanga Matthews, and her bold best friend Maya as they traverse the twists and turns of teenage years at Manhattan's John Quincy Adams Middle School where Riley's dad is their History teacher.

creator: Jaime Paglia
desc: 故事是發生在俄勒岡州一個名為Eureka的小鎮，這裡的居民幾乎都是天才和科學家。他們幾乎都在GD研究所工作。2007年，未來迷城獲得了艾美獎提名。
descEn: The sleepy Pacific Northwest town of Eureka is hiding a mysterious secret. The government has been relocating the world's geniuses and their families to this rustic town for years where innovation and chaos have lived hand in hand. U.S. Marshal Jack Carter stumbles upon this odd town after wrecking his car and becoming stranded there. When the denizens of the town unleash an unknown scientific creation, Carter jumps in to try to restore order and consequently learns of one of the country's best kept secrets.

creator: Joshua Safran
desc: 各自有不同背景的聯邦調查局新兵在位於維吉尼亞州的匡堤科（Quantico）基地接受訓練，包括面容姣好的舊金山女孩艾莉克絲、布魯克林文藝青年賽門、將自己打理整齊的摩門教徒艾瑞克、金童凱勒、南方女孩薛碧、包裹頭巾的妮馬，還有帥氣的萊恩，訓練課程開始前曾與艾莉克絲發生關係◦ 他們是菁英中的菁英，任誰都沒想到其中一個人竟是嫌疑犯，將在紐約發動911事件後最大的恐怖攻擊◦ 不同鏡頭交錯出每個人不為人知的過去與正在進行的訓練，另一條「未來」時間軸則在劇中閃爍出現，揭開這名恐怖份子策動攻擊的過程。
descEn: A diverse group of recruits has arrived at the FBI Quantico Base for training. They are the best, the brightest and the most vetted, so it seems impossible that one of them is suspected of masterminding the biggest attack on New York City since 9/11.

creator: Rebecca Sonnenshine
desc: 檔案學家丹透納接下一件神祕工作，負責修復一系列 1994 年的毀損影帶。這些影帶全出自紀錄片製片人梅洛蒂潘德拉斯 之手，紀錄她調查一個位在維瑟公寓大樓 （Visser Apartment Building）的危險邪教的紀錄。本季的劇情順著現代和過去兩條時間線展開，丹在修復的過程中，開始越來越執著地想知道梅洛蒂發生了什麼事，隨著兩名角色建立起神秘的連結，丹開始相信自己能拯救梅洛蒂，扭轉 25 年前的可怕結局。
descEn: An archivist takes a job restoring damaged videotapes and gets pulled into the vortex of a mystery involving the missing director and a demonic cult.

creator: Sam Bobrick
desc: 聚焦在海灣高中（Bayside High）就讀的六位好友，描述他們在青春期應對日常種種生活的故事。
descEn: Lovable schemer Zack Morris leads his pals on adventures at California's Bayside High School. The friends navigate relationships, final exams, school dances, breakups and more while frequently frustrating their principal, Mr. Richard Belding, who does his best to keep them in check.

titleCn: 三人要守密，兩人得死去
creator: Steve Lightfoot
desc: 單親媽媽與精神科診所的上司展開婚外情，暗中又與他神祕的妻子越走越近，一場扭曲的心理遊戲就此上演。
descEn: A single mother enters a world of twisted mind games when she begins an affair with her psychiatrist boss while secretly befriending his mysterious wife.

creator: Rob Thomas
desc: 《偵探小天后》由克莉絲汀貝爾（Kristen Bell）主演，融合青少年與破案偵探的元素。故事描述高中畢業的女主角在偵探父親的指導下，成為了一名私人偵探，開始展開她的解謎之旅。該劇播出三季被砍後，又透過粉絲集資方式推出電影版。2019 年由 Hulu 推出復活季，以迷你影集形式繼續講述女偵探故事。
descEn: In the fictional town of Neptune, California, student Veronica Mars progresses from high school to college while moonlighting as a private investigator under the tutelage of her detective father.

creator: 박은교
desc: 一群太空人展開 24 小時的危險月球任務，要尋回廢棄太空站上的機密樣本。
descEn: During a perilous 24-hour mission on the moon, space explorers try to retrieve samples from an abandoned research facility steeped in classified secrets.

creator: 朴俊和
desc: 此劇改編自2013年同名人氣網路漫畫，講述財閥二世、「裕明集團」副會長、顏值實力兼具的男主李英俊，和在他身邊如影隨形、既當秘書又當司機、能力滿分的9年女秘書金微笑的故事。
descEn: Lee Young-joon's family runs a large company and he works as the vice-president of the company. He is smart, rich and handsome, but he is arrogant. His secretary is Kim Mi-so. She has worked for him for years and she is perfect for him, but Kim Mi-so decides to quit her job.

titleCn: 夏洛特王后：柏捷頓家族前傳
creator: Shonda Rhimes
desc: 在這部《柏捷頓家族：名門韻事》前傳中，年輕的夏洛特王后嫁給英格蘭喬治國王，不只譜出動人的愛情故事，也為上流社會帶來新氣象。
descEn: Young Queen Charlotte's marriage to King George of England sparks an epic love story and transforms high society in this "Bridgerton" universe prequel.

creator: Hans Rosenfeldt
desc: 從丹麥哥本哈根通往瑞典馬爾默的厄勒海峽大橋上，發現了一具瑞典女政治家的屍體，因為屍體的位置處於兩國交界處，所以丹麥警察Martin rohde與瑞典警察Saga Norén決定一同找出兇手。
descEn: When a body is found on the bridge between Denmark and Sweden, right on the border, Danish inspector Martin Rohde and Swedish Saga Norén have to share jurisdiction and work together to find the killer.

creator: Joe Brumm
desc: 故事講述一隻叫作布麗的澳洲牧牛犬小狗，想像力無遠弗屆，她和妹妹賓果藉著玩遊戲來克服恐懼，也嘗試扮演大人的角色，盡情地探索這個世界。
descEn: Bluey is an inexhaustible six year-old Blue Heeler dog, who loves to play and turns everyday family life into extraordinary adventures, developing her imagination as well as her mental, physical and emotional resilience.

creator: 喬斯·溫登
desc: 劇情背景設定在維多利亞時代，講述一群具有超能力女子的故事，她們將共同打擊敵人，並執行一項可能足以改變世界的任務。
descEn: In the last years of Victoria's reign, London is beset by the "Touched": people — mostly women — who suddenly manifest abnormal abilities, some charming, some very disturbing. Among them are Amalia True, a mysterious, quick-fisted widow, and Penance Adair, a brilliant young inventor. They are the champions of this new underclass, making a home for the Touched, while fighting the forces of… well, pretty much all the forces — to make room for those whom history as we know it has no place.

creator: Scott Frank
desc:
一名殘酷無情的惡徒在尋找自己幫派前任成員的過程中，在美國西部引起一陣恐慌。對方卻在一座居民全是女性的安靜小鎮重獲新生。

這部美國西部傳奇影集請到《唐頓莊園》的蜜雪兒·道克利演出，傑夫·丹尼爾和瑪莉特·威佛亦展現精湛的演技，贏得艾美獎肯定。
descEn: A ruthless outlaw terrorizes the West in search of a former member of his gang, who’s found a new life in a quiet town populated only by women.

titleNative: Hasta que el dinero nos separe
creator: Fernando Gaitán
titleEn: Hasta que el dinero nos separe
descEn:
Hasta Que el Dinero Nos Separe is a telenovela produced by Emilio Larrosa. It is a remake of the Colombian soap opera Hasta Que la Plata Nos Separe. Hasta Que el Dinero Nos Separe stars Itatí Cantoral, Pedro Fernández, Victor Noriega, Luz Elena González and Joana Benedek. The telenovela made its debut on June 29, 2009 at 8 pm in Mexico's Canal de las Estrellas, in HD in some markets, and January 18, 2010 at 8/7 pm USA's Univision, starting on April 26, 2010, it aired from 8 pm est to 10 pm est in HD in some markets, until June 1, 2010, when Soy Tu Dueña premiered on Univision at 9pm, thus returning the novela back to its former one hour airing time. On February 16, 2010 Hasta Que El dinero nos separe premiered on internet TV's bsn Latino.

"The Best Telenovela of the Year 2010."

creator: Ronan Bennett
desc: 倫敦兩大犯罪家族——哈里根家族和史蒂文森家族互相爭權奪力，正處於交戰狀態，不是你死，就是我亡。而陷入這場交火的，是哈利達索薩，他是精明的街頭“調解人”，英俊又危險。哈利很清楚兩股對立的力量發生衝突時，應該要向誰投以忠誠。當兩座王國發生交戰，原則的界限將會被打破，而唯一的底線，就是不惜賭上性命的誓言：家庭永遠擺在第一位。
descEn: Two mob families clash in a war that threatens to topple empires and lives.

desc: 平凡的高三生修一在學校是個不起眼的男生，本以為能安然度過日常的他，某一天突然自身的身體產生了異變，化為宛如巨大布偶裝的「怪物」，為此他一直隱瞞著自己能隨心變身的秘密，直到遇見了一場廢棄倉庫中的大火災中倒下的一位女性後，再度變身將少女拯救出來，沒想到，這位名為紅愛的少女，將他的秘密視為把柄進而提出合作的要求，原來這一切都是與外星人幻化而成的「硬幣」有關，蒐集硬幣的能力者們，被稱為「收集者」，修一為了變回人類，以及尋找紅愛的姐姐，兩人決定合而為一，踏上這場充滿異常狀況的死亡旅途...
descEn: Shuichi Kagaya is an ordinary high school kid in a boring little town. But when a beautiful classmate is caught in a warehouse fire, he discovers a mysterious power: he can transform into a furry dog with an oversized revolver and a zipper down his back. He saves the girl’s life, sharing his secret with her. But she’s searching for the sister who killed her family, and she doesn’t care how degrading it gets: she will use Shuichi to accomplish her mission…

titleNative: キャンディ・キャンディ
creator: Kyoko Mizuki
desc: 這是一部以 20 世紀初為背景的勵志長篇動畫，講述主角甜甜在「保兒之家」孤兒院成長，並以其堅毅樂觀的性格對抗動盪命運的歷程。故事描繪她從被富家收養、經歷初戀對象安東尼意外逝世的打擊，到赴英留學期間與陶斯發展出一段深刻卻遺憾的戀情；最終她投身護理專業，在戰爭與生離死別的洗禮下日漸成熟，並揭開守護者「阿德烈大老爺」的真實身份。全劇透過甜甜起伏的人生，體現了女性成長、社會階級與人性光輝的宏大主題。
descEn:
This story is about a girl, Candy, who is a orphan. She is a nice and optimistic girl and she has a warm heart. When she was a child, she lived in an orphanage called Pony's Home. She had a good friend called Ann. And she met the "handsome boy on the hill" who is a important person in her life, on the hill behind the orphanage.

She was adopted by the Loka's family. What's awaiting her are the bad-hearted Leo and his sister, Eliza. One day, in the rose garden, she met a boy, who is identical to the "handsome boy on the hill" who she had met in her childhood. The boy is called Antony. Thereafter, a fantastic story that she has never expected begins.

creator: Ku Xuan
desc: 六歲就隨手幹掉了妖王吞天蛤，作為一個無所不能的修真奇才，王令得隱藏自己的大能，在一群平凡的修真學生中活下去。普通人追求的錢財，仙術，法寶，聲名，這個年輕人都不在意。無論豪門千金孫蓉的愛慕，影流頂級殺手的狙殺，父母無間斷的囉嗦，都無法阻止他對乾脆面的追求。不是在吃乾脆面，就是在去小賣部買乾脆面的路上。這樣的他，和四個隊友一起在論劍比賽中遭遇豪門高校的挑戰，而之前暗殺失敗的影流魔女教主江流影也不放棄的參合了進來。王令會碾壓對手？還是低調的躺倒裝死？
titleEn: The Daily Life of the Immortal King
descEn: As a cultivation genius who has achieved a new realm every two years since he was a year old, Wang Ling is a near-invincible existence with prowess far beyond his control. But now that he’s sixteen, he faces his greatest battle yet – Senior High School. With one challenge after another popping up, his plans for a low-key high school life seem further and further away…

desc: 少年悍將是由羅賓(Robin)、鋼骨(Cyborg)、人皮獸(Beast Boy)、俏嬌娃(Starfire)以及酷姬(Raven)所組成的超酷打擊犯罪組織,悍將們平日負責保護雀躍城的居民，阻止各類反派的狂妄行徑,故事中的親情友情愛情絕對引人入勝!!!
descEn: Robin, Starfire, Raven, Beast Boy and Cyborg return in all-new, comedic adventures. They may be super heroes who save the world every day ... but somebody still has to do the laundry!

creator: Jonathan M. Shiff
descEn: H2O: Just Add Water revolves around three teenage girls facing everyday teen problems with an added twist: they cope with the burden of growing a giant fin and transforming into mermaids whenever they come in contact with water.

desc: 《X戰警'97》回到最具代表性的1990年代，由變種人組成的X戰警利用他們不可思議的天賦，保護一個痛恨又恐懼他們的世界，接受前所未有的挑戰，並面臨出乎意料的危險新未來。
descEn: The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a dangerous and unexpected new future.

creator: Hilal Saral
descEn: Two separate worlds lie on two sides of the road in a seaside town. Both too close and way too far from each other. What happens when two young people from these worlds fall in love?  Kemal is one of the three children of a moderate family that lives in one of the inner neighborhoods of the town. His hand to mouth world has pinned all hopes on him. The motive of this world is not high aims, it’s to make a living and survive. It’s Kemal’s last year in mine engineering. His dreams are restricted with the truth and he doesn’t believe in miracles. Especially in miracles like love.  Kemal is soon tested with his disbelief and Nihan hops into his monotonous life. After that day Kemal’s world turns upside down and he loses control.

creator: 尤金·列維
desc: 影片出租行鉅子 Johnny Rose 本來有錢到爆，與肥皂劇明星太太莫拉 Moira 育有兩個孩子，超崇尚嬉皮的兒子 David 和時尚名媛 Alexis。某天突然發現自己破產，一家四口被迫搬到薛特溪，也就是他們以前當開玩笑買下的沉悶小鎮。要在這裡拋下奢華講究的生活，面對貧困處境，重新體驗家庭的意義。
descEn: Formerly filthy rich video store magnate Johnny Rose, his soap star wife Moira, and their two kids, über-hipster son David and socialite daughter Alexis, suddenly find themselves broke and forced to live in Schitt's Creek, a small depressing town they once bought as a joke.

desc: 殘忍的兇殺案現場留下一只栗子做的人偶，兩名警探循著這個令人毛骨悚然的線索，開始追查兇手，而兇手居然與一名政府官員失蹤的女兒有關聯。
descEn: At a grisly murder scene sits a figurine made of chestnuts. From this creepy clue, two detectives hunt a killer linked to a politician's missing child.

creator: Nicolás Entel
descEn: Drug lord Alonso Marroquín escapes from a Mexican prison in an attempt to go into hiding. A US military secret experiment goes wrong and the elite unit from the Mexican Police that is after Marroquín gets infected, creating a new zombie species. The Army and the zombies end up at the drug lord’s hideout and a battle for human survival begins.

creator: J·J·亞伯拉罕
desc:
19歲的雪梨·碧絲朵還在大學就讀一年級時，一個自稱為美國情報部門工作的男人接觸她，希望她可以參加特工的面試，因為她的條件符合成為一個特工的要求。最後，雪梨接受了這份工作，成為中央情報局（CIA）所屬部門──SD-6的其中一個特工。

經歷了七年學生與特工的生活，雪梨打算與交往了數年的醫生男友許丹尼（Danny Hecht）結婚，可雪梨不願對他隱瞞她的特工身分，於是她坦白地對男友說出真相。不過，得悉雪梨洩漏了她的特工身分後，SD-6唯有派人殺掉雪梨的男友。

傷心的雪梨在男友死後，便專注於學習，完全不理會SD-6的任務。當SD-6派人殺死有去意的雪梨時，她的父親傑克·碧絲朵及時將她救走。

這時
descEn: Sydney Bristow, an agent who has been tricked to believe she is working for the U.S. government, is actually working for a criminal organization named the Alliance of Twelve. Upon learning this, Sydney becomes a double agent for the real CIA.

creator: あだちとか
desc:
《流浪神差》是改編自漫畫家 安達渡嘉所著漫畫的動畫畫作品，故事描述身為神明卻因性格而被孤立的主角，為了賺取些微的香火錢而接受來自各地的委託。

穿著一身全黑體育服且沒有神社所供奉、缺少香火的落魄神明 夜斗，為了有朝一日能建立起自己的神社，他在各地的廁所牆壁上寫上自己的手機號碼並以五塊錢的香油錢為代價幫人實現願望；壹岐日和 是位捲入了車禍後常常靈魂出竅的少女，為了恢復原來的樣子而開始和夜斗一起行動，最後再加上 夜斗 使用的神器所化身的少男 雪音，三人開始展開與妖的對戰。
descEn: Hiyori Iki is a normal middle school student until she was involved in a bus accident while trying to protect a stranger. This incident causes her soul to frequently slip out of her body, and she becomes aware of the existence of two parallel worlds. Through her soul, she meets the strange, nameless god without a shrine, Yato. Yato is determined to make a name for himself out there by accepting any wishes for 5 yen, including Hiyori's to fix her body.

titleNative: The Suite Life of Zack & Cody
creator: Danny Kallis
titleEn: The Suite Life of Zack & Cody
descEn: Meet Zack and Cody, 11 year-old identical twins and the newest residents of Boston's swanky Tipton Hotel. Living in a suite with their mom Carey, the boys treat the Tipton like their own personal playground.

creator: C. E. Webber
desc: 該劇講述了名為「Doctor」的神秘外星時間旅行者，隨著他的時空機器TARDIS的冒險故事，他的時空機器外觀看上去像1950年代的警亭。博士帶著他的伙伴羅斯在時間、空間中探索悠遊、打擊邪惡力量、拯救文明、幫助人民、糾正錯誤、解決各類問題。
descEn: The adventures of The Doctor, a time-traveling humanoid alien known as a Time Lord. He explores the universe in his TARDIS, a sentient time-traveling spaceship. Its exterior appears as a blue British police box, which was a common sight in Britain in 1963 when the series first aired. Along with a succession of companions, The Doctor faces a variety of foes while working to save civilizations, help ordinary people, and right many wrongs.

creator: Cary Joji Fukunaga
desc: 時間來到 1896 年的紐約市。警察局長西奧多·羅斯福找來心理學家雷斯洛·奎斯勒，追捕一名專挑無家可歸的男孩下手的殺人犯。
descEn: New York, 1896. Police commissioner Theodore Roosevelt brings together criminal psychologist Dr. Laszlo Kreizler, newspaper illustrator John Moore and secretary Sara Howard to investigate several murders of male prostitutes.

creator: Jonathan Brackley
desc: 在不久的將來，那時候人類伴侶——超級仿真的人形機器人(hubot)已經十分普及，這些機器人在外表上和人類很相似，除了眼睛顏色和以電能作為能源外，與人類幾乎毫無差別。他們可以做大部分人類可以做的事，甚至可以作人類的性工具。大多數機器人都規規矩矩按照設定工作，但是有一群機器人（5人）不同，擁有自我意識並希望逃離人類尋找自由，在他們逃離的過程中，他們中的三個人被一群強盜攝走，兩女一男，一個被賣到妓院（Niska），一個被重新編程後賣到了一個普通家庭(Miya)，另一個被賣到園林工作。剩下兩個機器人（leo and maxie）開始了尋找夥伴的路。最後他們發現他們的創造者David(leo的父親)在他
descEn: In a parallel present where the latest must-have gadget for any busy family is a 'Synth' - a highly-developed robotic servant that's so similar to a real human it's transforming the way we live.

creator: Justin Richmond
desc: 一項驚人的發現促成兩位人類王子和一名精靈殺手並肩合作，展開一場英勇豪壯的冒險，要為烽火連天的國度帶來和平。
descEn: An extraordinary discovery inspires two human princes and an elven assassin to team up on an epic quest to bring peace to their warring lands.

desc: 《漫威影業：傳奇角色》重溫各個英雄和反派，他們預計於Disney+首播、備受期待的串流劇集中出現，為即將到來的冒險做準備。
descEn: Revisit the epic heroes, villains and moments from across the MCU in preparation for the stories still to come. Each dynamic segment feeds directly into the upcoming series — setting the stage for future events. This series weaves together the many threads that constitute the unparalleled Marvel Cinematic Universe.

creator: 大衛·S·高耶
desc: 《達文西闇黑英雄》改編自史實，時代背景設定於西元1477年文藝復興時期，年僅25歲的達文西捲入羅馬教廷與佛羅倫斯地方勢力紛爭陰謀的冒險愛情故事。
descEn: The series follows the "untold" story of Leonardo Da Vinci: the genius during his early years in Renaissance Florence. As a 25-year old artist, inventor, swordsman, lover, dreamer and idealist, he struggles to live within the confines of his own reality and time as he begins to not only see the future, but invent it.

creator: 羅溫·艾金森
desc: 這部喜劇影集講述糊塗老爸特雷弗幫人看管豪宅，期間他努力想擊敗一隻狡猾蜜蜂，卻引發諸多混亂。
descEn: Bumbling dad Trevor tries to get the best of a cunning bee while house-sitting a posh mansion — but only unleashes more chaos in this comedy series.

creator: 迪克·沃爾夫
desc: 每一集影集內容不乏根據真實案件和時事頭條新聞改編的事件內容。每集都由警方偵查開啟序幕，庭上偵訊作結收場。
descEn: In cases ripped from the headlines, police investigate serious and often deadly crimes, weighing the evidence and questioning the suspects until someone is taken into custody. The district attorney's office then builds a case to convict the perpetrator by proving the person guilty beyond a reasonable doubt. Working together, these expert teams navigate all sides of the complex criminal justice system to make New York a safer place.

creator: Sander Schwartz
descEn: Scooby-Doo and the Mystery, Inc. gang are launched into the 21st century, with new mysteries to solve.

creator: Jenna Bans
desc: 三名郊區媽媽為了擺脫財務困難並取得經濟獨立，湊在一起策劃了一樁當地超市搶劫案。
descEn: Three "good girl" suburban wives and mothers suddenly find themselves in desperate circumstances and decide to stop playing it safe and risk everything to take their power back.

creator: 賽斯·麥克法蘭
desc: 在 1993 年時，泰德的風光歲月已過，如今他和他最好的朋友約翰住在一起，在這個波士頓工薪階級的家中還有約翰的父母和表弟。對約翰來說，泰德可能不是對他有正面影響的益友，但當有難時，泰德願意竭盡全力幫助約翰的朋友和家人。
descEn: It's 1993 and Ted the bear's moment of fame has passed, leaving him living with his best friend, 16-year-old John Bennett, who lives in a working-class Boston home with his parents and cousin. Ted may not be the best influence on John, but when it comes right down to it, he's willing to go out on a limb to help his friend and his family.

titleNative: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
creator: 安德魯·林肯
desc: 繼續講述“兩個被改變了的世界所改變的角色的宏大愛情故事”，Rick和Michonne被不可阻擋的力量和他們自身的原因分開了，進入了另一個世界，掀起了一場與“死者”的戰爭，而最終，他們要面對活人。在那樣的地方，面對他們前所未見的形勢，兩人能找到彼此和自我嗎？他們是敵人，還是愛人，受害者，還是贏家？沒有了對方，他們甚至還活著嗎？抑或是，他們最終是否會發現，自己也是行屍走肉呢？
titleEn: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
descEn: Rick and Michonne are thrown into another world, built on a war against the dead... And ultimately, a war against the living. Can they find each other and who they were in a place and situation unlike any they've ever known before? Are they enemies? Lovers? Victims? Victors? Without each other, are they even alive – or will they find that they, too, are the Walking Dead?

titleNative: 干物妹! うまるちゃん
desc: 我的妹妹「小埋」是個容貌秀麗！文武雙全！ 任誰都會羡慕的完美女高中生♥ 而這個美少女妹妹她有個不為人知的秘密！！每當她一進 入家門後就會…… 這裡滾呀滾♪那裡滾呀滾♪ 過著「吃、睡、玩」的乾物妹生活！？追蹤在家耍任性在外是氣質美女「小埋」的生態！
descEn:
People are not always who they appear to be, as is the case with Umaru Doma, the perfect high school girl—that is, until she gets home! Once the front door closes, the real fun begins. When she dons her hamster hoodie, she transforms from a refined, over-achieving student into a lazy, junk food-eating otaku, leaving all the housework to her responsible older brother Taihei. Whether she's hanging out with her friends Nana Ebina and Kirie Motoba, or competing with her self-proclaimed "rival" Sylphinford Tachibana, Umaru knows how to kick back and have some fun!

Himouto! Umaru-chan is a cute story that follows the daily adventures of Umaru and Taihei, as they take care of—and put up with—each other the best they can, as well as the unbreakable bonds between friends and siblings.

creator: Dustin Thomason
desc: 這部恐怖影集根據多部史蒂芬·金的著作改編，以緬因州的虛構城鎮城堡岩為背景，交織串聯不同作品中的角色與劇情。
descEn: Based on the stories of Stephen King, the series intertwines characters and themes from the fictional town of Castle Rock.

From relative obscurity and a seemingly normal life, to overnight success and thrust into the Hollywood limelight overnight, the D’Amelios are faced with new challenges and opportunities they could not have imagined.

creator: 蘿拉·潔里奇
desc: 在洛杉磯一個治安欠佳的地區，四個聰明搞笑的街頭青少年發覺他們一輩子的友情在高中生活開始後面臨了重重考驗。
descEn: In a rough Los Angeles neighborhood, four smart, funny and streetwise teens find their lifelong friendship tested as they begin high school.

creator: Glenn Eichler
descEn: After moving to a new town with her stressed-out parents and relentlessly popular little sister, Daria uses her acerbic wit and keen powers of observation to contend with the mind-numbingly ridiculous world of Lawndale High.

creator: Shin Yoo-dam
desc: 本劇講述37歲的癌症患者智媛發現丈夫和最好的朋友背叛，頓悟整個生命都是謊言。更悲劇的是，她死於丈夫之手。幸運的是她有機會重新書寫她的命運，當她轉生為她年輕的自己時。這一次，她發誓要過上幸福的生活。但首先要來的是復仇。她的計劃是什麼呢？將她曾經最好的朋友嫁給她那個說謊、出軌的丈夫。
descEn: Kang Ji-won, a terminally ill cancer patient, is killed by her husband and best friend after she witnesses them having an affair. She wakes up 10 years before the incident and decides to seek revenge with the help of Yu Ji-hyuk, a director at the company where she works. Now, she must reclaim her fate and eliminate the trash from her life.

creator: 진한새
desc: 這個高中模範生進入重大犯罪的世界，因而擁有雙重身分。此時卻有同學對他的祕密感興趣，頓時讓他的生活天翻地覆。
descEn: Determined to escape a dead-end life, a gifted high school student turns to a world of serious crime to ensure he can pay for college.

titleCn: 復仇者聯盟之正義出擊
creator: Steven T. Seagle
desc: 浩克、索爾、美國隊長、鷹眼、獵鷹和黑寡婦結合了自己的力量來對抗任何一個英雄都無法獨自承受的威脅。當復仇者聯盟集合時，邪惡毫無勝算！
descEn: The further adventures of the Marvel Universe's mightiest general membership superhero team. With an all-star roster consisting of Iron Man, Captain America, Thor, Hulk, Hawkeye, Falcon and, occasionally--when she feels like it and only when she feels like it--Black Widow, the Avengers are a team in the truest sense. The Avengers save the world from the biggest threats imaginable--threats no single super hero could withstand.

creator: 珍妮·韓
desc: 大媒人少女凱蒂跟隨心之所向進入首爾菁英高中就讀，發現原來人生、感情和家庭關係比她所想的還要複雜許多。
descEn: Teen matchmaker Kitty Song Covey thinks she knows everything there is to know about love. But when she moves halfway across the world to reunite with her long-distance boyfriend, she'll soon realise that relationships are a lot more complicated when it's your heart on the line.

creator: Les Charles
descEn: The story about a blue-collar Boston bar run by former sports star Sam Malone and the quirky and wonderful people who worked and drank there.

creator: Gareth Evans
desc: 動作電影《全面突襲》導演蓋瑞斯艾文斯（Gareth Evans）打造高預算製作影集，《倫敦黑幫》故事背景設定在因國際幫派組織的權力角逐而遭到分裂的現代倫敦，描述其中之一黑幫的首腦遭到暗殺後，多方幫派間的權力平衡開始出現變動。
descEn: When the head of a criminal organisation, Finn Wallace is assassinated, the sudden power vacuum his death creates threatens the fragile peace between the intricate web of gangs operating on the streets of the city. Now it’s up to the grieving, volatile and impulsive Sean Wallace to restore control and find those responsible for killing his father.

creator: Pamela Eells
descEn: An idealistic teen from rural Texas embarks on the adventure of a lifetime when she decides to leave behind starry nights for big city lights. Thrilled to be on her own and determined not to be intimidated by New York City, she accepts a job as nanny for a high-profile couple with four kids. Helping to keep her moral compass in check are Bertram, the family's butler, and Tony, the building's 20-year-old doorman.

creator: Glen A. Larson
desc: 1982年至1986年在NBC播出的《霹靂遊俠》曾十分熱門。老版中，DavidHasselhoff扮演的遊俠駕駛著人工智能跑車KITT懲惡揚善，讓80年代的電視迷記憶深刻，如今遊俠的兒子MikeTraceur將帶領他的朋友和全新的奈特工業3000號跑車重回熒屏，繼續與邪惡作鬥爭。Sarah是斯坦福大學哲學博士學位的候選人，一天她從KITT那得知他的爸爸Charles失踪了，於是她和KITT啟程去尋找她兒時的玩伴兼前男友MikeTraceur，並說服了Mike幫她一同尋找Charles以及隱藏在這背後的真相。
descEn: On the heels of NBC's hit movie, the iconic 1980s television classic  comes roaring back to life as a reinvented, updated and super-charged  action series showcasing the new KITT (Knight Industries Three  Thousand). Absolutely the coolest car ever created, KITT is equipped  with an "AI" (artificial intelligence) that is capable of hacking almost  any system. Its weapons systems match that of a jet fighter, and its  body is capable of actually transforming into other vehicles and using  sophisticated holographic imagery to elude villains.

titleCn: 刺客旅館：捍衛任務世界
titleNative: The Continental: From the World of John Wick
creator: Greg Coolidge
desc: 影集《刺客旅館》講述了《捍衛任務》宇宙中著名的為刺客殺手提供庇護之飯店的暴力起源，背景設定在1970年代的紐約市，為了解決哥哥對大陸飯店出手帶來的麻煩，溫斯頓史考特必須組織一支團隊，揭開不為人知的龐大陰謀。這充滿暴力的動作劇情影集將探討親情、命運與復仇之間的利害衝突。
titleEn: The Continental: From the World of John Wick
descEn: The origin behind the iconic hotel-for-assassins through the eyes and actions of a young Winston Scott, as he's dragged into the Hell-scape of 1970's New York City to face a past he thought he'd left behind. Winston charts a deadly course through the hotel's mysterious underworld in a harrowing attempt to seize the hotel where he will eventually take his future throne.

desc: 《一個都不留》改編自「謀殺天后」阿嘉莎克莉絲蒂（Agatha Christie）的同名作品。故事描述十個素不相識的陌生人受到邀請，前往位於德文郡海岸外的島嶼別墅度假。期間，多名人物離奇死亡，倖存者人人自危，仿如驚弓之鳥，有誰能來這個荒郊野地拯救他們？
descEn: Ten strangers, drawn away from their normal lives to an isolated rock off the Devon coast. But as the mismatched group waits for the arrival of the hosts -- the improbably named Mr. and Mrs. U.N. Owen -- the weather sours and they find themselves cut off from civilization. Very soon, the guests, each struggling with their conscience, will start to die -- one by one, according to the rules of the nursery rhyme 'Ten Little Soldier Boys' -- a rhyme that hangs in every room of the house and ends with the most terrifying words of all: '... and then there were none.

creator: Dennis Kelly
desc: 《烏托邦實驗》是一部充滿神秘色彩的傳奇圖畫小說。 當一群陌生人發現自己擁有一份原稿時，他們的生活突然而殘酷地崩潰了。
descEn: The  Utopia Experiments is a legendary graphic novel shrouded in mystery.  When a group of strangers find themselves in possession of an original  manuscript, their lives suddenly and brutally implode.

creator: 格雷格·丹尼爾斯
desc: 《一家之主》由《癟四與大頭蛋》的編劇麥克·賈吉和《辛普森家庭》前編劇兼製作人格雷格·丹尼爾斯聯手打造。這是一部風格犀利的喜劇動畫影集，講述了默默無聞的德州居民漢克·希爾、他的家人以及鄉巴佬鄰居們遭遇的種種生活考驗。
descEn: Set in Texas, this animated series follows the life of propane salesman Hank Hill, who lives with his overly confident substitute Spanish teacher wife Peggy, wannabe comedian son Bobby, and naive niece Luanne. Hank has conservative views about God, family, and country, but his values and ethics are often challenged by the situations he, his family, and his beer-drinking neighbors/buddies find themselves in.

titleCn: Re：從零開始的異世界生活
titleNative: Re:ゼロから始める異世界生活
desc: 普通的高中生菜月昴從便利商店回家的路上，突然被召喚到異世界，遭遇強盜面臨性命危機，這時遇到了一位銀髮少女拯救了他，以報恩為名義，昴自告奮勇要幫助少女找東西。好不容易才掌握到線索，昴和少女卻被不明人士攻擊而死亡，但回過神來，昴卻發現自己置身在第一次被召喚到異世界時的所在位置，這是昴得到的能力 ──「死亡回歸」，死後時間會倒轉回到一開始。昴必須要跨越無數絕望，從死亡的命運中拯救少女！
descEn: Natsuki Subaru, an ordinary high school  student, is on his way home from the convenience store when he finds  himself transported to another world. As he's lost and confused in a new  world where he doesn't even know left from right, the only person to  reach out to him was a beautiful girl with silver hair. Determined to  repay her somehow for saving him from his own despair, Subaru agrees to  help the girl find something she's looking for.

creator: Michelle King
desc: 一個善良賢淑的家庭主婦「亞莉莎」(茱莉安娜瑪格麗絲 飾)，因身為檢察官的丈夫「彼得佛里克」(克里斯諾斯 飾)涉及一場召妓醜聞風波，她重操舊業回到律師事務所工作，變身職場女強人、專業的女律師，她以溫柔強韌的心辦案、開庭、幫助委託人打官司。同時，強忍淚水在公眾場合力挺丈夫，幫助他維持僅存不多的良好形象，雖不願碰觸自己的傷痛，但午夜夢迴時刻她還是眷戀起曾經和丈夫度過的美好時光。現在，她要照顧好一雙兒女，做個母兼父職的好媽媽，還有幫助更多的委託人，捍衛正義的使命感讓她找到人生新方向，而丈夫的醜聞官司持續發展，性愛錄影帶、貪污濫用職權…接踵而來的背叛與傷害，狠狠刺進她內心深處，她將如何面對這個人生的震撼
descEn: Alicia Florrick boldly assumes full responsibility for her family and re-enters the workforce after her husband's very public sex and political corruption scandal lands him in jail.

creator: 艾力克斯·畢納
desc: 這部衍生劇回顧柏林的輝煌過去，當時他和同夥齊聚巴黎，實行他最具野心的策劃：一夜間偷走價值 4400 萬歐元的珠寶。
descEn: During his glory days, Berlin and a gang assembled in Paris for one of his greatest plans ever: stealing 44 million euros' worth of jewels in one night.

creator: David M. Stern
desc: 《醜陋的美國人》是美國動畫喜劇，主創是大衛·克拉克和大衛·斯特恩。2010年3月17日至2012年4月25日播出，共兩季31集。故事的背景是一個的由人類和魔鬼、殭屍、吸血鬼、狼人、機器人等各種生物混居的地球，故事描述了紐約「族群融合局」社工馬克·禮萊和他周遭五花八門的生物的故事，有不少對美國現實的映射和諷刺內容。
descEn: Social worker Mark Lilly helps new citizens—both human and "other"—begin the process of adapting to life in the Big Apple, but his coworkers, demonic bureaucrat Twayne, drunken wizard Leonard Powers, surly law enforcement head Frank Grimes & his girlfriend, Callie, don't make it easy.

titleCn: 聖鬥士星矢：黃道十二宮戰士
titleNative: SAINT SEIYA: Knights of the Zodiac
desc: 星矢和黃道十二宮戰士再度挺身保護雅典娜女神的化身，但某個黑暗的預言卻威脅著所有人的性命。
titleEn: SAINT SEIYA: Knights of the Zodiac
descEn: Seiya and the Knights of the Zodiac rise again to protect the reincarnation of the goddess Athena, but a dark prophecy hangs over them all.

creator: 김은숙
desc: 劇情講述平凡現實的貧窮繼承者車恩尚（朴信惠 飾）與上流社會1%的繼承者金潭（李敏鎬 飾）和崔永道（金宇彬 飾）邂逅後所展開的浪漫羅曼史，是一部描繪富家子弟高中生們之間愛情與友情的青春偶像劇。
descEn: After a chance encounter in LA, two teens from different social backgrounds reunite at an exclusive high school attended by Korea's über rich.

creator: Roberto Stopello
descEn: The adventures of Vicenta Acero, the feared coyote who now leads the dynasty of illicit dealings once under the control of her father.

desc:
雖然參加新學期開學典禮是一件令人開心的事，但對剛升上高中二年級的高須龍兒來說心情卻是五味雜陳。

龍兒是一位平凡的學生，但在同學眼中卻是個避之唯恐不及的「危險人物」，原因就在於他天生的凶惡眼神，讓他看起來活像個不良少年！雖然新學期幸運地與好友北村祐作以及暗戀對象的櫛枝實乃梨被分配在同一班讓他很高興，但現在更重要的是要盡快解開同學們對他的誤會才行...

在龍兒的班上有一位被人稱作「掌上老虎」的女學生 - 逢坂大河，這個外號是因為逢坂嬌小的身材以及散發出來的強烈壓迫感而得名﹝大河日文發音類似 Tiger﹞，「龍」與「虎」充滿衝擊性的初次相遇，將會帶來什麼樣的故事發展？
descEn: Menacing in appearance but gentle at heart, second year high school student Ryuuji forms an unlikely friendship with classmate Taiga, a tiny girl with a sharp tongue and a tough attitude.

creator: Sandro Corsaro
desc: 《冒險王奇克》講述了小男孩奇克巴斯基的故事，他打算靠玩命行為成名，途中克服了難以置信的障礙。他受到了傳奇人物不怕死的意志和決心的鼓舞。
descEn: Clarence Buttowski, a young boy, aspires to become the world's greatest daredevil, as he gets help from Gunther, his loyal friend and partner-in-crime.

creator: Choi A-il
desc: 一個冷酷的惡魔與冰冷的繼承人糾纏在一起後，竟然喪失了能力。她可能是他恢復力量的關鍵，以及打開他心房的鑰匙。
descEn: A pitiless demon becomes powerless after getting entangled with an icy heiress, who may hold the key to his lost abilities — and his heart.

creator: Chris Prynoski
desc: 他們很粗暴、無賴，他們是不合時宜的傭兵。機械之聲對輕鬆賺錢和廉價啤酒更感興趣，而不是真正地保護這個領域。但是當王國受到邪惡的威脅時，這群喧鬧的團員意識到他們是唯一能夠恢復正義的人。開始是一個簡單的發薪日，現在是艾森卓最新英雄的背後起源故事。
descEn: They're rowdy, they're ragtag, they're misfits turned mercenaries for hire. Vox Machina is more interested in easy money and cheap ale than actually protecting the realm. But when the kingdom is threatened by evil, this boisterous crew realizes that they are the only ones capable of restoring justice.

creator: Blake Crouch
desc: 傑森戴申遭人綁架，進入平行時空。為了回到真正的家人身邊，他踏上一段艱辛旅程，要幫助他們逃離最可怕的敵人：他自己。
descEn: Jason Dessen is abducted into an alternate version of his life. To get back to his true family, he embarks on a harrowing journey to save them from the most terrifying foe imaginable: himself.

desc: 動畫片的主角丁滿是一隻狐獴，彭彭是一頭疣豬，這兩個角色來自迪士尼的動畫電影《獅子王》。故事發生在原版電影之後，講述了兩個主角在叢林中探險的經歷，不同場景遍佈全球，比如加拿大、英國、美國和西班牙。
descEn: Set after the events of the "The Lion King," follow Timon and Pumbaa as they go on misadventures in the jungle, as well as across the globe in various.

titleNative: 美少女戦士セーラームーンCrystal
desc: 月野兔是一個個性迷糊又愛哭的中學二年級女生，有一天在路上遇上了一隻額頭上有著三日月印的黑貓露娜。此契機使之變身為愛與正義的水手服美少女戰士 Sailor Moon。小兔與其朋友化身為戰士的使命，在於找尋幻之銀水晶以保護某個王國的公主。另一方面黑暗帝國的貝莉爾女王顯現，為了得到幻之銀水晶，派部下至兔居住的城鎮中引發了各樣奇怪的事情。到底一眾美少女戰士能否完成她們的使命？
descEn: Usagi Tsukino is chosen to be a guardian of justice and is sent on a quest to locate a Silver Crystal before the Dark Kingdom invades the Earth.

desc: 以男子花式溜冰為主題的作品，描述主角、也就是日本代表選手 勝生勇利與來自世界各地的選手們競逐的故事。
descEn: While on the verge of retirement, skater Yuri Katsuki meets Yuri Plisetsky and Victor Nikiforov, two skaters who rekindle his competitive fire.

titleCn: 別惹喵皇：肉搜網際殺手
titleNative: Don't F**k with Cats: Hunting an Internet Killer
creator: Mark Lewis
desc: 看見變態罪犯的殘酷影片，讓一群業餘線上偵探決定展開危險的肉搜行動，卻陷入黑暗的地下世界。
titleEn: Don't F**k with Cats: Hunting an Internet Killer
descEn: A twisted criminal's gruesome videos drive a group of amateur online sleuths to launch a risky manhunt that pulls them into a dark underworld.

titleCn: 聖鬥士星矢 THE LOST CANVAS 冥王神話
titleNative: 聖闘士星矢 THE LOST CANVAS 冥王神話
desc: 故事講述距離《聖鬥士星矢》本篇所處年代的243年之前的聖戰的故事。受到天秤座的黃金聖鬥士童虎的引薦，天馬前往希臘聖域接受聖鬥士的訓練。在聖域，天馬遇到了兒時的玩伴紗夏。紗夏，原來竟然是女神雅典娜的轉世……
descEn: The Sacred war tale that took place during the 18th century is now unveiled. Tenma, Alone and Sasha, three orphans living their childhood protecting each other and then separated at diferent ages made a pact to meet again. Find themselves again connected but now in roles they never saw as posible. Pegasus, Hades and Athena. Its now time to fight but destiny can be bitter since war between Athena and Hades forces can put old friends and families face to face.

titleNative: Maxton Hall - Die Welt zwischen uns
desc: 露比無意間目睹麥斯頓豪爾私立學校一樁爆炸性祕密，引來富家公子詹姆士布佛特不滿。詹姆士決心要讓機靈且獲得獎學金的露比封口。然而，雙方在激烈的對峙中，卻意外擦出了情愫的火花…
titleEn: Maxton Hall – The World Between Us
descEn: When Ruby unwittingly witnesses an explosive secret at Maxton Hall private school, the arrogant millionaire heir James Beaufort has to deal with the quick-witted scholarship student for better or worse: He is determined to silence Ruby. Their passionate exchange of words unexpectedly ignites a spark...

creator: 克里斯·桑德斯
desc: 這部動畫系列講述了叛逆科學家 Jumba Jookiba 博士心愛的實驗 626 的進一步冒險，他現在作為 Lilo 的外星好友 Stitch 幸福地生活著。 Jumba 的剩餘實驗已以脫水豆莢的形式降落在夏威夷各地。莉洛和史迪奇的任務是在史迪奇的「表兄弟」落入邪惡的雅克·馮·哈姆斯特菲爾博士的魔爪之前將他們抓獲！
descEn: This animated series chronicles the further adventures of renegade scientist Dr. Jumba Jookiba's beloved Experiment 626, who is now living happily as Lilo's alien buddy Stitch. Jumba’s remaining experiments have landed all over Hawaii in the form of dehydrated pods. Lilo and Stitch’s mission is to catch Stitch’s "cousins" before they fall into the clutches of the evil Dr. Jacques von Hamsterviel!

creator: Phil Rosenthal
desc: 《大家都愛雷蒙》講述雷羅曼諾（Ray Romano）飾演的體育記者雷蒙一家的日常生活。故事主要圍繞著婆媳之間、兄弟之間、夫妻之間、親子之間的各種矛盾展開。
descEn: Ray Barone is a successful sportswriter living on Long Island with his wife Debra, daughter Ally, and twin sons, Geoffrey and Michael. Ray's meddling parents, Frank and Marie, and brother, Robert, live directly across the street.

creator: Joe Pokaski
desc: 漫威超級英雄漫畫改編影集《斗篷與匕首》劇情描述富家女 Tandy 長大走偏搶劫又吸毒，曾是無家可歸的 Tyrone 則在一個健全的中產階級家庭長大。某一夜，這兩人在同一個鄰近地點遭遇到改變人生的悲劇。他們不僅形成難以解釋的連結，更意外獲得超能力：Tandy 可以產生光能轉化為匕首射殺敵手，還可以用光治療毒癮；Tyrone 的身體則是接近蟲洞的一種黑暗空間，可以實現短距離瞬間傳送。
descEn: Two teenagers from very different backgrounds awaken to newly acquired superpowers which mysteriously link them to one another.

creator: 保羅·索倫提諾
desc: 講述裘德洛飾演的虛構角色連尼貝拉多（Lenny Belardo）又名庇護十三世（Pius XIII），是第一位美國教宗。年輕、迷人的他背負著上帝的使命，作為一個爭議性人物，他必須在梵蒂岡的對抗中習得駕馭權術，為人民尋得神祇的庇護。
descEn: Lenny Belardo, the youngest and first American Pope in the history of the Church, must establish his new papacy and navigate the power struggles of the closed, secretive Vatican.

creator: Arne Nolting
desc: 一名羅馬軍官在養育他的強大帝國和自己出身的部族之間，陷入天人交戰。他糾結該效忠於誰，繼而引發史上赫赫有名的浩大征戰。
descEn: Three people's fates are interwoven in the Battle of the Teutoburg Forest in 9 A.D., during which Germanic warriors halt the spread of the Roman Empire.

creator: 強納生·崔普爾
desc:
《唐人街戰士》由《玩命關頭》系列電影導演林詣彬（Justin Lin）執行製作、《竊盜警長》（Banshee）主創之一強納森崔普爾（Jonathan Tropper）擔綱主創與編劇。

《唐人街戰士》劇情改編自功夫巨星李小龍（Bruce Lee）撰寫的原創題材，背景設定在美國南北戰爭結束後，一位中國的年輕武術天才初來乍到舊金山，身陷中國城的血腥堂口混戰。
descEn: A gritty, action-packed crime drama set during the brutal Tong Wars of San Francisco’s Chinatown in the second half of the 19th century. The series follows Ah Sahm, a martial arts prodigy who immigrates from China to San Francisco under mysterious circumstances, and becomes a hatchet man for one of Chinatown’s most powerful tongs.

desc: 這是極少數思春期的少年少女才會發生的特殊能力。藉由在暗中驅使其能力，過著一帆風順的學校生活的乙坂有宇， 以及突然出現在他眼前的少女友利奈緒。因為與她的相遇而被揭開的，特殊能力者們的命運。這是在青春的路上奔馳著的能力者們的故事 ──
descEn: All thanks to the special ability that he developed, Yuu was able to  cheat his way into a very prestigious high school. With his power, he  thought nothing was going to stand in his way, until he met a mysterious  girl named Nao Tomori and other students with special abilities just like him. It was the beginning to a new life.

creator: Doug Ellin
desc: 《我家也有大明星》的劇情主要是圍繞在以好萊塢一線男星文森·「文斯」·錢司（Vincent "Vince" Chase）為中心，與一群同樣來自紐約皇后區的死黨兼跟班們一同闖蕩演藝圈的故事。由道格·埃林（Doug Ellin）擔任原著劇本，並由馬克·華伯格（Mark Wahlberg）與史提芬·列文森（Stephen Levinson，他同時也是華伯格的經理人）擔任執行製作，故事靈感起源於本身也是知名演員的馬克·華伯格與他身邊一群來自波士頓的友人之親身經歷，但劇中人物無論是風格與個性，都是重新杜撰創造。
descEn: Film star Vince Chase navigates the vapid terrain of Los Angeles with a close circle of friends and his trusty agent.

creator: Kenn Navarro
descEn: This action and adventure comedy is drawn in simple appearance and combines cute forest animals with extreme graphic violence. Each episode revolves around the characters enduring accidental events of bloodshed, pain, dismemberment and/or death.

desc: 這裡是魔法的世界，眾人將使用魔法這件事視為理所當然，並且使用魔法技術優劣決定地位高低。在深山的森林中，有一位不斷進行肌肉訓練的少年。這位少年名叫「馬修．班地德」，——『他不會魔法』。 馬修是個異類，因為他天生就不會使用魔法，被養父藏匿起來照顧。養父生怕他因此被別人傷害，便從小教他重訓，希望他可以用體魄來保護自己。意想不到的是在不斷的鍛鍊之下，馬修的肌肉不只能保護自己，更足以粉碎絕大多數的魔法！？為了讓自己能跟家人能平安生活，決定用長年鍛鍊出來的一身肌肉與世界抗衡。不正常的奇幻故事，就此開始！
descEn: This is a world of magic where magic is used for everything. But deep in the forest exists a young man who spends his time training and bulking up. He can't use magic, but he enjoys a peaceful life with his father. But one day, his life is put in danger! Will his muscular body protect him from the magic users who are out to get him? Powerfully trained muscles crush magic as this abnormal magical fantasy begins!

creator: Ryan J. Condal
desc: 故事描述2015年洛杉磯被神秘的「外部勢力」佔領，一部分美國人被迫與其合作並從這種新秩序中獲益，另一部分美國人則掀起反抗運動——但是他們必須為「革命」付出高昂的代價。
descEn: In the near future a family must make difficult decisions as they balance staying together with trying to survive. They live in Los Angeles, which has been occupied by a force of outside intruders.  While some people have chosen to collaborate with the authorities and benefit from the new order, others have rebelled — and suffer the consequences.

creator: Ha Byung-hoon
desc: 本劇改編自漫畫，描述31歲男主角在事業和感情的挫折後，做出結束生命的極端選擇。接著，一神秘存在告知他將經歷13種截然不同的人生。在連續的輪迴中，透過各種人生和死亡經驗，他對死亡的態度逐漸轉變，重新探索人生和死亡的意義。
descEn: At the brink of going to hell, Yee-jae must cycle through twelve separate lives and twelve separate deaths in this reincarnation drama.

desc:
於孤兒院生活的莉可，其願望是成為白笛，前往母親十年前前往的的深淵底層。某天莉可發現一個疑似來自深淵深處的機器人，將他取名為雷古，並發現不知因何原因而沒有記憶。為了收留雷古，莉可與好友替雷古編造孤兒身世，使他加入孤兒院。

不久後，之前下潛的黑笛探窟家哈勃返回，並帶回殲滅卿萊莎的白笛與書信。在書信中莉可看到疑似關於雷古的介紹與一句留言「在奈落之底等待」，同時由於雷古想了解自己的來歷，雷古和莉可在朋友的協助下潛入了深淵。
descEn: Located in the center of a remote island, the Abyss is the last unexplored region, a huge and treacherous fathomless hole inhabited by strange creatures where only the bravest adventurers descend in search of ancient relics. In the upper levels of the Abyss, Riko, a girl who dreams of becoming an explorer, stumbles upon a mysterious little boy.

The controversial life and history of Argentine football legend Diego Armando Maradona. From his beginnings in Villa Fiorito, one of the poorest barrios of Buenos Aires, to achieving glory on the international football league. Earning himself a well-deserved place in history. Living a life strewn with drugs, sex and public scrutiny, he played by his own rules regardless of the consequences. Watch the man who took the world by storm and made his way into the hearts of millions.

creator: Jo Soo-won
desc: 以因患有皮諾丘症候群而不能說謊的記者崔仁荷（朴信惠飾）為主人公，講述她成為一名真正記者的經歷以及她和因事故而以假名生活的記者崔達佈（李鍾碩飾）及沒有接觸過平民的財閥的兒子徐帆潮（金英光飾）在電視台擔任社會部記者的生活，作為平時24小時都要與放送戰爭的仁荷慢慢成長的活潑青春故事
descEn: In-ha and Ha-myeong become reporters for different reasons: one aspires to follow in her mother's footsteps and the other seeks to do honest news.

creator: 布雷特·戈德斯坦
desc: 吉米因為失去妻子而感到極為悲傷，同時還要努力扮演好父親、朋友和治療師的角色。他決定嘗試一種新的方法來對待他生活中的每個人：不修飾且殘酷的誠實。這種做法會改善現況，還是會引發一場令人捧腹大笑的混亂呢？
descEn: Jimmy is struggling to grieve the loss of his wife while being a dad, friend, and therapist. He decides to try a new approach with everyone in his path: unfiltered, brutal honesty. Will it make things better—or unleash uproarious chaos?

creator: Álex de la Iglesia
desc:
聖經記載，猶大曾因30枚銀幣出賣耶穌基督。兩千年後，西班牙某個偏遠小鎮上，其中一枚銀幣悄然現世。這滿附罪孽的硬幣似有強大魔力，欲把羅馬教廷隱瞞多年的秘密公之於眾，人類命運也面臨威脅。被貶於此鎮教區的神父貝爾加拉也未能倖免。世人皆知其神職，卻不知他也是拳擊手、驅魔人。他本想脫離俗世，安心隱居，奈何敵人接踵而至……

小鎮上發生多起神秘事件，矛頭直指貝爾加拉。因而單純質樸的鎮長帕科，連同惶恐不安的獸醫埃萊娜，密謀追尋貝爾加拉的過去，揭開那枚銀幣掩藏已久的秘密。
descEn: Father Vergara—an exorcist, boxer and ex-convict—lives in a remote village in Spain. Hoping to be lost and forgotten, Vergara’s demons catch up to him.

titleCn: 平凡職業造就世界最強
titleNative: ありふれた職業で世界最強
desc: 『被霸凌的孩子』南雲始與同班同學一起被召喚至異世界。雖然同學們接連顯現戰鬥取向的特殊能力，但始卻只擁有煉成師這種平凡的能力。而且在異世界仍為最弱的他，竟被某位同學惡意推落了迷宮深淵──！？
titleEn: Arifureta: From Commonplace to World's Strongest
descEn: Hajime Nagumo and his high school class are suddenly summoned to a fantastical land as heroes. But while most of his classmates have powerful stats and abilities, Hajime does not. Underappreciated and unprepared, he tumbles into the depths of a monster-infested dungeon where voracity and sacrifice are his only options. To thrive in this savage world, he’ll have no choice but to welcome the abyss.

creator: 柳濟元
desc: 來自大城市的牙醫師在人情味十足的濱海村落開設診所，在這裡遇見一位迷人卻事事跟她唱反調的萬事通。
descEn: A big-city dentist opens up a practice in a close-knit seaside village, home to a charming jack-of-all-trades who is her polar opposite in every way.

creator: 范·帕特伯
descEn: Johnny Bravo tells the story of a biceps-bulging, karate-chopping free spirit who believes he is a gift from God to the women of the earth. Unfortunately for Johnny, everyone else sees him as a narcissistic Mama's boy with big muscles and even bigger hair. In short, he is the quintessential guy who 'just doesn't get it.' No matter what he does, or where he finds himself, he always winds up being his own worst enemy.

creator: Matthew Miller
desc:
《不死法醫》描述伊恩葛魯佛飾演的亨利摩根自200多年前死亡，當時他在非洲奴隸船上為了保護病人被槍擊致死，但擁有轉世超能力的他每次死亡後，都會裸體在水中復生。

200多年來，亨利摩根運用從事各行各業的科學知識，用精準的推斷來協助搭檔調查案件。
descEn: Doctor Henry Morgan, New York City’s star medical examiner, has a secret. He doesn't just study the dead to solve criminal cases, he does it to solve the mystery that has eluded him for 200 years—the answer to his own inexplicable immortality. This long life has given Henry remarkable observation skills which impresses his new partner, Detective Jo Martinez. Each week, a new case and their budding friendship will reveal layers of Henry’s long and colorful past. Only his best friend and confidant, Abe knows Henry’s secret.

creator: Madeleine Smithberg
desc: 不管是大膽評論每天的新聞、調查美國國內的人事物，或是毒舌批判時下政客的選舉政見，每日秀都要帶給你著名的「最值得信任的假新聞」。
descEn: The World's Fakest News Team tackle the biggest stories in news, politics and pop culture.

desc: 1800年前，人類惡念凝聚而成的怪物—八歧大蛇肆虐人間，被以草薙家族為首的武術家們用三件神器封印。現代，世界綜合格斗大賽- THE KING OF FIGHTERS（簡稱KOF）召開，全世界的格鬥高手集聚南鎮。草薙家族的傳人-草薙京來到南鎮之後，他敏銳地感覺到了大蛇之力的複蘇，一切跡象表明KOF大賽背後隱藏著一個巨大的陰謀。隨著KOF大賽的召開，所有的隊伍，抱著各自的目的，漸漸被命運之手拉到了一起。而幕後的邪惡勢力已然布下了天羅地網，準備將所有的格鬥家一網打盡。正義與邪惡的對決一觸即發！
descEn: An animated tie-in for the video games The King of Fighters: World and The King of Fighters: Destiny.

creator: Carlos Villegas Rosales
descEn: A story of revenge and ambition, seduction and betrayal; all told from the perspective of an offended and abused woman named Altagracia. Altagracia represents the hundreds of thousands of Mexican women who have been victims of the violence by faceless men who are protected by impunity. But Altagracia, transformed into a strong-willed, ruthless man-eater known as La Doña, will seek out each and every one of these men to bring them to justice.

desc: 故事描述，人會突然起火燃燒，變成火炎怪物「焰人」作亂，這是神秘的人體自燃現象。第八特殊消防隊的新隊員森羅日下部從小就很崇拜英雄，但由於母親從前在一次意外中身亡時，他卻露出了生硬的笑容，而被人稱為「惡魔」。之後，他還得到了「第三世代」控制火焰的能力。為了找出母親和弟弟身亡的真相，森羅加入了特殊消防隊，將會打倒「焰人」，追尋這個現象的謎團。
descEn: Year 198 of the Solar Era in Tokyo, special fire brigades are fighting against a phenomenon called spontaneous human combustion where humans beings are turned into living infernos called "Infernals". While the Infernals are first generation cases of spontaneous human combustion, later generations possess the ability to manipulate flames while retaining human form. Shinra Kusakabe, a youth who gained the nickname Devil's Footprints for his ability to ignite his feet at will, joins the Special Fire Force Company 8 which composes of other flames users as they work to extinguish any Infernals they encounter. As a faction that is creating Infernals appears, Shira begins to uncover the truth behind a mysterious fire that caused the death of his family twelve years ago.

creator: R.L. Stine
descEn: Anything can turn spooky in this horror anthology series based on the best-selling books by master of kid horror, R.L. Stine. In every episode, see what happens when regular kids find themselves in scary situations, and how they work to confront and overcome their fears.

creator: 奧倫·烏齊爾
desc: 私家偵探班萊利接下幾樁看似單純的案子，沒想到黑幫分子、怪物，以及一位神祕的「蛇蠍美人」織起一張陰謀之網，讓他必須面對過去，那個紐約唯一超級英雄的身分：「蜘蛛人」。
descEn: Ben Reilly, an aging and down on his luck private investigator in 1930s New York, is forced to grapple with his past life as the city's one and only superhero.

creator: 泰勒·謝里丹
desc: 描述美國密西根州的 McLusky 一家，他們是此地的政治掮客，而當地的經濟依靠的是監獄事業。本劇著重的主題包含系統性的種族主義、貪腐與不平等。
descEn: In a small Michigan town where the business of incarceration is the only thriving industry, the McClusky family are the power brokers between the police, criminals, inmates, prison guards and politicians in a city completely dependent on prisons and the prisoners they contain.

creator: Eddie Gorodetsky
desc: 本劇描述年輕的單親媽媽克莉絲蒂（安娜·法瑞絲 飾），在匿名戒酒會（AA）上遇到許久未見的母親邦妮（艾莉森·珍妮 飾）後，她們在加州納帕縣的戒酒新生活。
descEn: Aan irreverent and outrageous take on true family love‐and dysfunction. Newly sober single mom Christy struggles to raise two children in a world full of temptations and pitfalls. Testing her sobriety is her formerly estranged mother, now back in Christy's life and eager to share passive-aggressive insights into her daughter's many mistakes.
Lain—driven by the abrupt suicide of a classmate—logs on to the Wired and promptly loses herself in a twisted mass of hallucinations, memories, and interconnected-psyches.

desc: 這部實境競賽節目靈感源自《魷魚遊戲》，456 位玩家在此接受終極考驗，各憑實力角逐足以改變一生的 456 萬美金大獎。
descEn: In this reality competition show inspired by "Squid Game," 456 players put their skills to the ultimate test for a life-changing $4.56 million prize.

titleCn: 異種族風俗娘評鑑指南
desc:
在某個各種奇幻種族和平共存的世界，雖然法律規定只有擁有夢魔血統的人才能從事風俗店，稱作「夢魔店」。但由於「各種族混血日久，幾乎任何人往上查個十代至少都會有個夢魔祖先」這種方便的理由，所以幾乎所有種族都能從業，也因此應運而生了許多由不同種族開設的夢魔店，風俗娘稱為「夢魔女郎」。

好色的人類冒險者史坦克和精靈傑爾為了體驗各個種族的夢魔店，在世界冒險並寫下心得感想廣發於市。兩人在森林裡從怪物手上救下了雌雄同體的天使可利姆，並拉入他們的團隊。然而，面對種族各異的夢魔店，評論者也會因種族與偏好不同有著天差地別的感想，從而產生了許多意想不到的展開與笑料。
descEn: In a world bursting at the seams with moe monsters and humanoids of the horned sort, which brave heroes will take it upon themselves to review the beastly babes of the red-light district? Can only one be crowned the ultimate title of best girl? Behold the most tantalizing of trials.

creator: 詹姆斯·蓋伊-里斯
desc: 在一級方程式賽車每個激烈的賽季中，車手、經理、車隊老闆在賽場內外，每天都過著緊張刺激的精彩生活。
descEn: Drivers, managers and team owners live life in the fast lane — both on and off the track — during each cutthroat season of Formula 1 racing.

When Eva and Rubén travel back in time to 1957, they try to go unnoticed until they find a way to return. Their plans change after Eva falls for Italian heartthrob JJ, and her actions begin to drastically alter the future.

titleNative: デジモンアドベンチャー：
desc: 在數碼世界發生某些異常狀況之際，為了修復這些異常狀況，被選召的普遍人類。他們比其他人更早得到搭檔數碼獸，附加了「為了修復異常狀況而戰」的義務
descEn: It's the year 2020. The Network has become something humans can no longer do without in their daily lives. But what humans don't know is that on the other side of the Network is the Digital World, a realm of light and darkness. Nor are they aware of the Digimon who live there. Fifth grader Taichi Yagami's mother and little sister Hikari went to Shibuya, and now they're aboard a runaway train. Taichi hurries to Shibuya to save his mother and sister, but the instant he heads toward the station platform... a strange phenomenon befalls the DigiDestined, and Taichi goes to the Digital World!

creator: Peter Rees
desc: 由特效專家亞當·薩維奇和傑米·海納曼主持，他們利用自身的專業和技巧，針對各種廣為流傳的謠言和都會傳奇進行實驗，節目由羅伯特·李（Robert Lee）擔任旁白，主要在舊金山灣區錄影，於澳大利亞新南威爾斯州阿爾塔蒙剪輯。
descEn: MythBusters is a science entertainment television program created and produced by Australia's Beyond Television Productions for the Discovery Channel. The show's hosts, special effects experts Adam Savage and Jamie Hyneman, use elements of the scientific method to test the validity of rumors, myths, movie scenes, adages, Internet videos, and news stories.

creator: Mike McMahan
desc: 一個外星人家庭在地球上墜毀，他們必須在美國中部避難。
descEn: A family of aliens from a much better world must take refuge in middle America after the destruction of their planet. Their mission: protect the Pupa, a living super computer that will one day evolve into its true form, consume them and terraform the Earth.

titleNative: Pandemic: How to Prevent an Outbreak
desc: 這部紀錄片系列介紹在第一線對抗流感的英勇先鋒，探索他們防堵下一波全球疫情爆發，所做出的各種努力。
titleEn: Pandemic: How to Prevent an Outbreak
descEn: In this docuseries, meet the heroes on the front lines of the battle against influenza and learn about their efforts to stop the next global outbreak.

creator: 大衛·E·凱利
desc: 一場可怕的謀殺案顛覆了芝加哥檢察官辦公室，因為其中一名檢察官涉嫌犯罪，而被告只好奮力將家人維繫在一起。
descEn: A horrific murder upends the Chicago Prosecuting Attorney's Office when one of its own is suspected of the crime—leaving the accused fighting to keep his family together.

creator: Daniel Écija
descEn: El Internado Laguna Negra was a Spanish television drama-thriller focusing on the students of a fictional boarding school in a forest, where teenagers are sent by their parents to study. The boarding school is situated in a forest far from the city, on the outskirts on which macabre events occur. The series debut on 24 May 2007, and is a production of Antena 3. Although the show is recorded and produced in HD, it is only broadcast in SD. However, an HD Blu-ray Disc release has been announced.

creator: Steve Yockey
desc: 故事描述空服員卡珊德拉鮑登（Cassandra Bowden）對飲酒愛不釋手，宿醉更是家常便飯。一日，當她在杜拜的飯店醒來，打算趕往機場與機組人員會合。正當她試著拼湊前一晚所發生的事情時，發現昨晚與她度過的男人陳屍在一旁。她因過度害怕開始撒謊，在前往巴黎的頭等艙中向同事撒謊，在紐約向聯邦調查局探員撒謊。不久後，真相漸漸浮出水面，在杜拜的那晚究竟發生了什麼事？是她殺了他嗎？如果不是，又是誰下的手呢？
descEn: Flight attendant Cassandra Bowden wakes in her hotel room hungover from the night before in Dubai with a dead body lying next to her. Afraid to call the police, she continues her morning as if nothing happened. In New York, she is met by FBI agents who question her about her recent layover in Bangkok. Still unable to piece the night together, she begins to wonder if she could be the killer.

creator: David Weil
desc:
《逃出絕命鎮》奧斯卡編劇喬登皮爾（Jordan Peele）製作 Amazon 恐怖驚悚美劇《納粹獵人》（舊片名《The Hunt》，Hunters）根據真人真事改編，由演員轉編劇的大衛惠爾（David Weil）主創、編劇，與喬登皮爾共同擔綱執行製作人，今年五月已直接獲 Amazon 預訂成季共十集，首播集將由《美國恐怖故事》導演艾方索戈梅茲-雷瓊（Alfonso Gomez-Rejon）執導。

劇情描述 1977 年散落在美國紐約的納粹獵人以復仇與正義之名，對那些受美國政府庇護的納粹成員展開屠殺。他們發現有上百位的高階納粹官員居住在此，密謀在美國建立納粹第四帝國實施種族滅絕。這群納粹獵人
descEn: A diverse band of Nazi Hunters living in 1977 New York City discover that hundreds of high ranking Nazi officials are living among us and conspiring to create a Fourth Reich in the U.S. The eclectic team of Hunters set out on a bloody quest to bring the Nazis to justice and thwart their new genocidal plans.

creator: Liz Feldman
desc: 一位魯莽暴躁的寡婦，四處尋找一位撞死丈夫卻肇事逃逸的駕駛。她和一名古怪的樂觀主義者成了朋友，對方卻似乎別有隱情。
descEn: A hotheaded widow searching for the hit-and-run driver who mowed down her husband befriends an eccentric optimist who isn't quite what she seems.

creator: Tina Fey
desc: 一個女人從末日教派邪教被救出，莫名其妙地落腳紐約市。她超努力學習在這個超乎她的理解和想像範圍的新世界生活。
descEn: When a woman is rescued from a doomsday cult and lands in New York City, she must navigate a world she didn't think even existed anymore.

desc: 遭逢威爾遜菲斯克的犯罪帝國追殺，瑪雅洛佩茲回到自己的老家，並面對自己的家族和家族遺緒。
descEn: Pursued by Wilson Fisk's criminal empire, Maya's journey brings her home and she must confront her own family and legacy.

creator: Dan Cross
desc: 茱莉喪母後失去對音樂的熱情，然而當三名幽靈男孩出現並振奮她的精神後，他們竟決定共組樂團！
descEn: Teenage Julie finds her passion for music and life while helping the Phantoms -- a trio of ghostly guys -- become the band they were never able to be.

titleCn: 新魔法美人魚：水中冒險
creator: Jonathan M. Shiff
desc: 本系列為《美少女人魚》續集，描述意外變成人魚的男孩扎克，對三名負責保衛魅可島的年輕美人魚帶來威脅。
descEn: Real-life mermaids, Sirena, Nixie and Lyla are part of a mermaid pod, which lives in the waters of Mako Island. As young members of the pod, it is their job to protect the Moon Pool and guard it from trespassers. But on the night of a full moon, the mischievous mermaid girls neglect their duties. Sixteen-year-old land-dweller Zac enters the Moon Pool and forms a special connection with Mako. Zac is given a fish-like tail and amazing powers. The mermaid pod is forced to leave Mako, leaving behind the three mermaid girls, cast out of the pod. They know there's only one way they will be allowed to rejoin the pod: They must get legs, venture onto land and take back Zac's powers – or risk being outcasts forever.

creator: Rosy Ocampo
descEn: Leticia Padilla Solís, “Leti”, is an intelligent but unattractive girl, rather ugly. She graduated with honors in economics, speaks several languages, is fluent in computers, and is a financial genius. Only, because of his physique, she can't find work. Desperate to find a job, “Lety” decides to accept being hired below her level and takes a job as a secretary at Conceptos, a famous video production company, where ugliness is taboo. The production company “Conceptos” was founded by two good friends: Don Humberto Mendiola, and Julián Villaroel. Unfortunately, shortly after, the Villaroels die in an accident and Don Humberto and his wife Teresita take care of the Villaroels' orphaned children: Ariel, Marcia and Ana Leticia and the successful company.

creator: 홍정은
desc:
深藏在首爾繁榮的市區中心，座落著一家奇怪的旅館，有著人們先前不曾見過的外觀。古老到難以形容，這棟建築已經屹立千年，是事情並非總是能以外表來衡量的永存不滅證言。經營這家旅館的是張滿月，一個貪婪多疑的鬼魂，在過去一千年來一直擔任這家旅館的社長。

因為受到她已經不記得曾犯過的罪愆詛咒，滿月命中註定要經營這家怪異旅館度過永恆時光，照料最奇異顧客們的需求。她唯一的逃脫希望，是找到一個犯下比她更糟罪愆的人，但是經過千年之後，她開始喪失希望。

然而在具燦成出現時，事情出現有趣的轉折。燦成曾經是多國旅館公司最年輕的副理，他發現自己因為父親多年前與滿月所做的交易，被迫要管理德魯納旅館。他是個循規蹈矩的人，也
descEn: When he's invited to manage a hotel for dead souls, an elite hotelier gets to know the establishment's ancient owner and her strange world.

creator: Eric Kripke
desc: 描述不久的未來全世界所有能量都神秘消失，這讓一群倖存者得用雙手與智慧來努力生存並尋找他們所愛的人。
descEn: One day, electricity just stopped working and the world was suddenly thrust back into the dark ages. Now, 15 years later, a young woman's life is dramatically changed when a local militia arrives and kills her father, who mysteriously—and unbeknownst to her—had something to do with the blackout. An unlikely group sets out off on a daring journey to find answers about the past in the hopes of reclaiming the future.

desc: 世界最自我中心的人，才能成為世界第一的前鋒。為了讓日本在世界盃中得到冠軍，日本足球聯盟展開了培育前鋒的計畫。其名為「藍色監獄」計畫。召集了300位高中生，且這300位都是前鋒。犧牲299位的足球生涯而誕生，在日本足球界掀起革命的前鋒會是?
descEn: High school soccer players from across Japan gather for a controversial project designed to create the best — and most egoistic — striker in the world.

creator: Charley Parlapanides
desc: 生活在古希臘的一介平民赫倫發現自己的真實身分是宙斯之子，他的目標則是從惡魔軍隊手中拯救世界。
descEn: In a brewing war between the gods of Olympus and the titans, Heron, a commoner living on the outskirts of ancient Greece, becomes mankind's best hope of surviving an evil demon army, when he discovers the secrets of his past.

desc:
鮎沢美咲就讀星華高中二年一班，16歲的她是該校學生會第一位女性會長。因為星華高中原本是男校，現在雖改為男女合校，男生仍然佔絕大多數，形成女生在此毫無地位的局面。而為了守護女生，美咲以文武兩道都不輸於男生的能力全天候與蠻橫的男生對抗。

美咲父親留下了債務後人間蒸發，這種不負責任的行為給美咲留下了心理創傷，使她相當討厭男性（這也是她強大起來的動力）。為了能夠對捉襟見肘的家庭有所幫助，美咲一直在女僕咖啡廳做兼職。所謂沒有永遠的秘密，這個秘密被學校中大受女生歡迎、同時也是自己競爭對手的碓冰拓海知道了......在第六集碓冰開始正式追求美咲，最後也墜入了愛河......
descEn: Misaki Ayuzawa is the first female student council president at a once all-boys school turned co-ed. She rules the school with strict discipline demeanor. But she has a secret, she works at a maid cafe due to her families circumstances. One day the popular A-student and notorious heart breaker Takumi Usui finds out her secret and makes a deal with her to keep it hush from the school in exchange for spending some time with him.

creator: 喬什·施瓦茲
descEn: Miles enrolls in a new boarding school seeking adventure. There, he befriends a group of quirky students led by the captivating and troubled Alaska. As they pull pranks and explore dark secrets, a night of celebration takes a tragic turn, forcing the group to grapple with loss and the complexities of growing up.

titleNative: Are You Afraid of the Dark?
creator: D.J. MacHale
titleEn: Are You Afraid of the Dark?
descEn: This spooky anthology series for kids recounts ghost stories told by the young members of the Midnight Society as they gather around a campfire. Each episode opens with members of the Midnight Society at their secret spot in the woods, where they prepare their fire and the night's storyteller announces the title of the his or her offering. However, the cameras soon leave the storyteller and switch to the tale being told.

creator: Christopher Keyser
desc:
《新社會》（前劇名為《Hamelins》）被形容宛如《Lost檔案》遇上《蒼蠅王》，故事背景設定在風景如畫的新英格蘭郊區西漢姆上，描述當地空氣被腐爛的惡臭所污染後，小鎮上的父母們為了孩子們的安全，將他們紛紛送上巴士逃離這個地方。然而在這群青少年於巴士度過幾小時後，怪事發生了。他們在午夜時被未知力量送回原處，但腐爛惡臭、父母們全都消失了，茂密森林也擋住了所有對外道路。現在，他們在沒有出路、沒有大人，無法跟外界聯絡的狀態下，將聚集起來找出生存的方法。

《五口之家》編劇克里斯多福凱瑟（Christopher Keyser）主創、《蜘蛛人：驚奇再起》導演馬克韋伯（Marc Webb）執導。主演為《美
descEn: When everyone else mysteriously vanishes from their wealthy town, the teen residents of West Ham must forge their own society to survive.

creator: Caridad Bravo Adams
descEn: A telenovela that dramatizes the romances and rivalries between two brothers and two sisters in Mexico between the years 1885 and 1900.

creator: Andrew Dabb
desc: 多年前爆發的病毒危機導致全球陷入末日絕境，現在潔德·威斯克誓言扳倒罪魁禍首，同時力抗感染者，為自己打出生天。
descEn: Nearly three decades after the discovery of the T-virus, an outbreak reveals the Umbrella Corporation's dark secrets. Based on the horror franchise.

creator: Gina Fattore
desc: 漢娜威爾斯為了贏得暗戀對象的心，開始擔任曲棍球隊隊長蓋瑞特格雷罕的家教。這場交易在他們面對各自過去的過程中，轉化為真實的情感連結。好友羅根、迪恩、塔克與艾莉也一同在大學生活與愛情中摸索前行。
descEn: Hannah Wells tutors hockey captain Garrett Graham to win over her crush. Their deal becomes real connection as they face their pasts. Friends Logan, Dean, Tucker, and Allie navigate college life and love.

creator: Chun Sung-il
desc: 正當遺產爭奪戰激烈開打之際，帥氣的集團繼承人碰上一位努力討生活的員工，她的招牌笑容讓別人難以抗拒，但他卻怎麼看都不順眼，兩人隨即正面交鋒。
descEn: Amid a tense inheritance fight, a charming heir clashes with his hardworking employee who's known for her irresistible smile — which he cannot stand.

desc: 主要描寫在閃點事件重組前的平行宇宙地球十二(Earth-12)的蝙蝠俠布魯斯·韋恩老後，2023年出生，年僅16歲的新蝙蝠俠泰瑞·麥金尼斯（Terry McGinnis）接替老蝙蝠俠當上未來高譚市的守護者。泰瑞在韋恩的輔助下，一面面對維持正常生活的挑戰，一面對付自己一系列的罪犯：以小丑為榜樣的童黨Jokerz、大同花順黨（The Royal Flush Gang）、國際恐怖主義組織眼鏡蛇等，還要對付老蝙蝠俠的敵人，包括急凍人、忍者大師等，就連宿敵小丑也從死亡中奇蹟地復活，與新一代蝙蝠俠續戰。
descEn: As new villains overrun Gotham City of the future, the aging Bruce Wayne hangs up the cape of the once invincible Batman. But when troubled teenager Terry McGinnis stumbles upon the Dark Knight's secret, a new alliance is forged. And a triumphant new Batman is born.

desc:
故事敘述連續蟬連全國中學籃球大賽三年的超強學校帝光中學，因其籃球隊才能之非凡卓越，而使正選的五名天才籃球手被稱之為「奇蹟世代」聞名於當世。但在五人之外，鮮為人知的還有以極端消除自己的存在感以純助攻活躍幫助場上五人的「幻之第六人」黑子哲也！

　　升上高中後眾人各自分散於各校，黑子為了打倒昔日的隊友稱霸全國，而與在美國成長而歸日之籃球好手火神大我攜手合作，誓言成為最強的光與影攻輔組合，帶領所屬誠凜高中籃球部，奪得全日本高校籃球大賽冠軍！
descEn: In the story, Kagami Taiga has just enrolled into Seirin High School when he meets Kuroko Tetsuya of the school's basketball team. Kuroko happens to be the shadowy sixth member of the legendary Generation of Miracles basketball team. Together, Kagami and Kuroko aim to take their team to the inter-high school championship - against Kuroko's former teammates.

desc: 在某個邊境公會裡，有個只靠討伐哥布林就升上銀等的罕見案例…。一名女神官成為冒險者後，首次加入團隊，就在冒險中陷入了危機。而拯救了她的，正是這名人稱「哥布林殺手」的男子。他不擇手段，不辭勞苦，潛心掃蕩哥布林。女神官被這樣的他牽著走，公會的櫃臺小姐感謝他，兒時玩伴的牧牛妹等候他。一名森人少女聽聞他的事蹟，也現身委託任務……
descEn:
"I'm not saving the world. I just kill goblins."

Rumor has it that, in a certain guild in the middle of nowhere, there is an extraordinary man who has climbed all the way to the Silver rank just by killing goblins. At the same guild, a priestess who's just become a new adventurer has formed her first party... and the man who ends up rescuing that party when they get into trouble is none other than the Goblin Slayer.

creator: C.S. Prince
desc: 1994 年，一群野心勃勃的盜賊計劃搞一場大搶案，要從哥倫比亞中央銀行劫走億萬財富。改編自真實事件。
descEn: Based on the 1994 robbery of US$33 million from Colombia's central bank, which turned the country upside down.

creator: 柴智屏
desc: 董杉菜一心想在夢寐以求的大學出人頭地，卻在這裡碰見一支外型亮眼、大受歡迎，還是人生勝利組的菁英小團體，並陷入愛河。
descEn: An ordinary girl is admitted to the most prestigious school in the country where she encounters F4, an exclusive group comprised of the four wealthiest and handsomest boys in the school - Dao Mingsi, Hua Zelei, Xi Men and Mei Zuo.

creator: 巴特·法卓克
desc: 《豔放80》由《美國恐怖故事》布萊德佛查克與瑞恩墨菲共同主創，《飢餓遊戲》系列電影製作人妮娜賈柏森（Nina Jacobson）、《末日之戰》製作人布萊德辛普森（Brad Simpson）製作。故事背景設定在1980年代紐約上流社會，講述當下的時代精神、文化氛圍，以及 LGBT 文化。
descEn: A dance musical that explores the juxtaposition of several segments of 1980s life and society in New York: the ball culture world, the rise of the luxury Trump-era universe and the downtown social and literary scene.

creator: Dylan Moran
desc: 《布萊克書店》（英語：Black Books）是一部英國情景喜劇，由迪倫·莫蘭和格雷厄姆·萊恩漢合作編劇，從2000年至2004年在第四台播出。該劇講述了倫敦的一家二手書店中發生的故事，主要角色為書店老闆伯納德·布萊克、他的助理曼尼·比楊科和好友弗蘭·卡曾加墨，分別由迪倫·莫蘭、比爾·貝利和塔姆辛·格雷格飾演。
descEn:
Black Books centres around the foul tempered and wildly eccentric bookshop owner Bernard Black. Bernard’s devotion to the twin pleasures of drunkenness and wilful antagonism deepens and enriches both his life and that of Manny, his assistant. Bearded, sweet and good, Manny is everything that Bernard isn’t and is punished by Bernard relentlessly just for the crime of existing. They depend on each other for meaning as Fran, their oldest friend, depends on them for distraction.

Black Books is a haven of books, wine and conversation, the only threat to the group’s peace and prosperity is their own limitless stupidity.

creator: Choi Yoo-Jung
desc: 愛情對栽進愛河的少女來說，是既心酸又甜蜜，她和隔壁鄰居的關係隨著兩人長大成人開始轉變。
descEn: Love is as tough as it is sweet for a lovestruck teenager, whose relationship with her next-door neighbor transforms as they grow into adulthood.

creator: 凱文·威廉森
descEn: Dawson's Creek is an American teen drama that portrays the fictional lives of a close-knit group of teenagers through high school and college.

creator: 卡爾·捨費爾
desc:
在殭屍末日甫降臨的黑暗時刻，素昧平生的陌生人團結一心，鼓起此際亟需的勇氣奮力求生，力圖重返摯愛身邊。

這部恐怖動作劇情影集由《南國醫戀》及《萬惡城市》女星潔米·金主演，為《殭屍國度》的前導作品。
descEn: In the dark, early days of a zombie apocalypse, complete strangers band together to find the strength they need to survive and get back to loved ones.

creator: Shonda Rhimes
desc: 美國總統前媒體關係主管奧利維亞波普離開白宮，開辦了自己的公司。她和團隊利用法律智慧和人脈為華盛頓特區處理危機，挽救聲譽，扼殺醞釀中的醜聞。儘管他們處理爭議的方式很專業，但團隊內部也存在一些醜聞。奧利維亞曾和總統有一段戀情，儘管他們仍然渴望在一起，但事業優先，兩人的戀情是不可能的。
descEn: Everyone has secrets and Olivia Pope has dedicated her life to protecting and defending the public images of the elite by keeping those secrets under wraps. Pope and her team are at the top of their game when it comes to getting the job done for their clients, but it becomes apparent that these "gladiators in suits," who specialize in fixing the lives of other people, have trouble fixing those closest at hand -- their own.

creator: John Fusco
desc: 這部奢靡的劇情影集在充滿貪婪、背叛、誘惑與競爭的世界開展，描述探險家馬可波羅在 13 世紀的精彩冒險。
descEn: Set in a world of greed, betrayal, sexual intrigue and rivalry, this lavish drama series follows explorer Marco Polo's adventures in the 13th century.

creator: 史蒂芬·金
descEn: A jet leaves on a red-eye flight from Los Angeles to Boston. But early in the flight, ten passengers awaken to a startling realization: All of the other passengers have vanished.

desc:
在異世界「哈爾凱尼亞」，被露易絲當作使魔召喚出來的日本高中生平賀才人被捲入了這個世界的一切。召喚才人出來的是長相可愛但完全沒有魔法才能的露易絲。一臉茫然的才人突然被露易絲強吻之後，他的手背出現了一個[盧恩文字](符文)，才人自此變成了露易絲的使魔。

故事主要圍繞在托里斯汀（即露易絲等人所在的王國）所發生的大小事情，並描述露易絲和才人從最差的主僕關係逐漸親近的成長過程。
descEn: Louise Françoise Le Blanc de La Vallière’s name is so long and her spell-casting skills are so poor that everyone at the Tristain Academy of Magic just calls her “Louise the Zero.” Louise’s humiliation only increases during an important second-year test, she inexplicably summons Saito Hiraga, a totally normal teenager from Tokyo. Now she’s stuck with him and Saito’s stuck with the lousy life of being a familiar.

desc: 故事主要是敘述一隻來自22世紀的貓型機器人——「哆啦A夢」，受原本主人「野比世修」的託付，回到20世紀，運用四次元口袋裡的許多奇妙道具幫助世修的高祖父「野比大雄」的故事。
descEn: Doraemon is an anime TV series created by Fujiko F. Fujio and based on the manga series of the same name. This anime is the much more successful successor of the 1973 anime.

creator: Rockne S. O'Bannon
descEn: A freak accident during an experimental space mission catapults Astronaut John Crichton across a thousand galaxies to an alien battlefield.

creator: 大衛·E·凱利
desc: 描述九位陌生人因不同的原因來到偏僻的療養中心，試圖治癒心中的傷口。負責人瑪莎致力於幫助每位入住的客人，讓他們真誠地面對自己，但也有著黑暗過往的她該如何解決自己的難題？而這九位陌生人間的背後故事又會如何牽動彼此？
descEn: At a boutique health-and-wellness resort that promises healing and transformation, nine stressed city dwellers try to get on a path to a better way of living. Watching over them during this 10-day retreat is the resort's director, Masha, a woman on a mission to reinvigorate their tired minds and bodies. However, these nine "perfect" strangers have no idea what is about to hit them.

creator: Sergio Castro San Martín
descEn: Blanca, student leader of the feminist movement in an occupied school, goes missing: hours later, a video of a group raping the girl goes viral. In their aim to find her, a police squad formed by three women puts their lives and that of their families at risk. As they look for Blanca and investigate, they will find out that behind this gender crime there is much more than just one offender.

titleCn: 不正經的魔術講師與禁忌教典
titleNative: ロクでなし魔術講師と禁忌教典
creator: Tarou Hitsuji
desc: 賴在別人家裡、一年過著無職生活的 葛倫·雷達斯，在家主的強迫下到 阿爾扎諾帝國帝國魔術學院擔任兼職講師。但他假自習之名行打瞌睡之實，就算難得站上了講台，他也是直接把課本釘在黑板上。就在想早點辭職的心態下，被學生 西絲蒂娜·席貝爾提出了決鬥。結果令人遺憾地，葛倫以懸殊的差距吞下了敗戰……然而與政府敵對的魔術結社「天之智慧研究會」襲擊了學院，葛倫也被捲進了一連串的紛爭之中。
titleEn: Akashic Records of Bastard Magic Instructor
descEn: The Alzano Imperial Magic Academy is located in the southern part of the Alzano Empire and is among most prominent magic schools in the world, where students can learn the highest forms of magic. All those who strive to learn magic dream of studying at this academy, and its students as well as its teachers are proud to be a part of its 400-year history. Glenn Radars is a new instructor who has suddenly been appointed to teach part-time at this highly respected academy. The previously unheard-of lessons of this man known as a good-for-nothing bastard are about to begin.

creator: Jed Spingarn
descEn: Meet The Thundermans, a typical suburban family that happens to have astounding superpowers. At the center of the action are the 14-year-old Thunderman twins, who share the same bathroom, the same school, and the same annoying little siblings. Their only difference? The sister is a super student with a super sunny disposition who super looks forward to being a superhero someday, and her twin brother is a super villain.

creator: William Dozier
descEn: Wealthy entrepreneur Bruce Wayne and his ward Dick Grayson lead a double life: they are actually crime fighting duo Batman and Robin. A secret Batpole in the Wayne mansion leads to the Batcave, where Police Commissioner Gordon often calls with the latest emergency threatening Gotham City. Racing to the scene of the crime in the Batmobile, Batman and Robin must (with the help of their trusty Bat-utility-belt) thwart the efforts of a variety of master criminals, including The Riddler, The Joker, Catwoman, and The Penguin.

desc: 在英國某個村莊，吸血鬼和食屍鬼橫行霸道，禍害人間。旨在消滅反基督怪物的皇家國教騎士團（Hellsing）派出強大、恐怖的吸血鬼殺手阿爾卡特，阿爾卡特打敗邪物，也間接將倒霉的女警察西洛斯·維多利亞變成吸血鬼，進而成為Hellsing的一員。此後不久，Hellsing總部遭到近乎毀滅性的入侵，隨著各種離奇事件層出不窮，一個名為“千禧年”的邪惡組織慢慢浮出水面。他們全由納粹戰敗軍官組成，為了一雪二戰之恥，這群戰爭狂人不惜製造一支吸血鬼軍團。攪合了多方勢力的正邪大戰就此拉開序幕……
descEn:
Vampires exist. It is the duty of Hellsing, an organization sponsored by the British government, to hide that frightening fact and protect the blissfully unaware populace.

Lately, vampire activity has been on the rise and the cause is more alarming than anything they could have imagined.
The series dramatizes the life story of Mexican superstar singer Luis Miguel, who has captivated audiences in Latin America and beyond for decades.

creator: Ariel Shaffir
desc: 故事敘述喬許·福特曼在白天是名清潔工，而到晚上則是電子遊戲玩家；忽然有一天，被神秘人召喚，使他必須透過時間旅行來阻止人類的滅絕。
descEn: Josh Futturman, a janitor by day/world-ranked gamer by night, is tasked with preventing the extinction of humanity after mysterious visitors from the future proclaim him the key to defeating the imminent super-race invasion.

creator: Calvin Kim
descEn: "Pucca" is a TV series based on a Flash animation series published by Vooz Character Systems. It follows the trails and exploits of a South Korean girl named Pucca who is insanely in love with a prideful ninja named Garu. Meanwhile, Garu and Pucca help their town of Sooga Village out when evil ninjas attack, as well as diffuse a lot of the absurd situations that frequently plague the town. This show could best be described as a cleaned-up version of South Park meets Looney Tunes meets Naruto. There is some very subtly hidden adult humor; but most of the adult jokes would not go noticed by small children, who are the primary audience.

desc: 故事描述悟空一行人捲入某個陰謀事件，全員因此回歸小時候的身軀。為了解決這件事，及彌補自己嬌小的體型，所以悟空重拾過去的如意棒，在未知而神秘的世界中展開一場的盛大冒險。
descEn: Mysteriously transformed into mini versions of themselves, Goku and his friends travel to the Demon Realm to uncover the truth and find a cure.

creator: J. Michael Straczynski
desc: 《巴比倫五號》（英語：Babylon 5）是美國的科幻電視劇，由作者兼製作人約瑟夫·麥可·斯特拉日恩斯基製作，並掛上巴比倫作品的大名，與Straczynski's Synthetic Worlds Ltd. 和華納兄弟電視公司聯合作品。在1993年2月22日《巴比倫五號:聚集》的成功電視試播後，1993年5月，華納兄弟開始正式製作該系列，作為其Prime Time Entertainment Network的一部分。
descEn: Babylon 5 is a five-mile long space station located in neutral space. Built by the Earth Alliance in the 2250s, its goal is to maintain peace among the various alien races by providing a sanctuary where grievances and negotiations can be worked out among duly appointed ambassadors. A council made up of representatives from the five major space-faring civilizations - the Earth Alliance, Minbari Federation, Centauri Republic, Narn Regime, and Vorlon Empire - work with the League of Non-Aligned Worlds to keep interstellar relations under control. Aside from its diplomatic function, Babylon 5 also serves as a military post for Earth and a port of call for travelers, traders, businessmen, criminals, and Rangers.

desc: 《正義聯盟》（英語：Justice League），簡稱JL，是一部美國的電視動畫劇集，一組由超級英雄組成的聯盟。該系列從2001年到2004年在美國的卡通電視網（Cartoon Network）上播映。此節目由華納兄弟動畫公司（Warner Bros. Animation）製作，它是基於《美國正義聯盟》（The Justice League of America / JLA）和相關的DC漫畫出版的漫畫角色。在播完第二季後，它演變成為《超人正義聯盟》，並增加了額外的三個季度。與蝙蝠俠：動畫系列、超人：動畫系列為共同世界觀，同樣為Earth-12。
descEn: The long-awaited rebirth of the greatest superhero team of all time: Batman, Superman, Wonder Woman, The Flash, Hawkgirl, Green Lantern, and Martian Manhunter.
